programme.title: Wildest Africa: Cape Coast: Where Worlds Colide
programme.desc: Watch Africa's Cape Coast that goes from the frigid waters of Cape Point to the sub-tropic seas of Kwazulu-Natal.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Congo: the Untamed Heart
programme.desc: Known for centuries as Africa's Dark Heart, the Congo is a multi-layered, three-dimensional world, seething with innumerable species. By peeling back the layers, we discover how this vast rainforest works, and expose the hidden lives of its inhabitants.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Sahara: Life on the Edge
programme.desc: Watch Africa's Cape Coast that goes from the frigid waters of Cape Point to the sub-tropic seas of Kwazulu-Natal./After, see Africa's Dark Heart in the Congo which is seething with innumerable species./Last,learn about the largest desert in the world.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Lake Turkana: Land of the Crocodile
programme.desc: The largest of Africa's Rift valley lakes, Lake Turkana is at the heart of one of the harshest landscapes on the planet. Despite its hostile environment, man and beast have both worked out a way to survive.
programme.sub-title: Lake Turkana: Land of the Crocodile

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Ethiopia: Land of Extremes
programme.desc: Landlocked and surrounded by five countries, Ethiopia is one of east Africa's forgotten lands. Seemingly passive deserts in fact seethe with fire, and cloud-piercing peaks shield a secret Eden of canyons and cliff-tops teeming with life.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Amazon: One Jungle, Many Worlds
programme.desc: The Amazon is the largest rainforest in the world, and the richest ecosystem on earth. This film uncovers what makes the Amazon such a powerhouse of evolution; how it has come to home a third of all species on the planet.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Patagonia: The Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Patagonia is a place of extremes  of vast ice fields and snow-capped mountains; of windswept deserts, and violent oceans. Survival here means being tough enough to cope with brutal winters, and canny enough to exploit brief seasons of plenty.
programme.sub-title: Patagonia: The Ends of the Earth

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Venezuela: The Treasure of El Dorado
programme.desc: Venezuela is famous for its lost worlds, its forbidding mountains, huge swamps, and impenetrable jungles, all seemingly cut off in space and time. Yet each is linked, by the mighty river: the Orinoco, the rumoured route to El Dorado, city of gold.
programme.sub-title: Venezuela: The Treasure of El Dorado

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Pantanal: Brazil's Wild Heart
programme.desc: Every year the Pantanal is drowned by immense floods, and then suffer severe drought. Yet, while people struggle, the Pantanal hosts some of the greatest gatherings of animals on the planet.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: The Andes: World in the Clouds
programme.desc: The longest chain of mountains in the world, the Andes run the length of western South America and dictate the climate for the whole continent. They include some of the highest peaks outside the Himalayas.
programme.sub-title: The Andes: World in the Clouds

programme.title: Wildest India: Thar Desert: Sacred Sands
programme.desc: Covering 200,000 km sq, India's Thar desert is one of the harshest places on Earth. Desiccating winds and near permanent drought has earned this unforgiving land another name: the region of death.

programme.title: Wildest India: Ganges: River of Life
programme.desc: Then watch, the longest river in India, The Ganges. It's a lifeline to wild animals, from rhinoceros and river dolphins to otters and gharials.

programme.title: Wildest India: The Himalayas: Surviving the Summits
programme.desc: The Himalayas run across 2,500km of north India. he Himalayas' rugged highlands offer little direct refuge to humans, in the shadow below, over a billion people in India rely on the mountains for survival.

programme.title: Wildest India: Western Ghats: Monsoon Mountains
programme.desc: See how the Himalayas run across 2,500km of north India.The Himalayas' highlands offer little direct refuge to humans. /Then, learn about the western Ghats. A spine of mountains that lay claim to being one of the most bio-diverse places in the world.

programme.title: Wildest India: India's Lost World
programme.desc: North-east India is an anthropological paradise; there is no other place on Earth with so many different ethnic groups. The forest are filled with mysterious tribes whose lives are dictated by the rain and the seasonal fruits of the forest.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Okavango: Water in the Desert
programme.desc: The Okavango Delta, a huge emerald oasis in the burning heart of the Kalahari desert, is fed by the Okavango River and this perpetual cycle of wet and dry is the lifeblood of this extraordinary natural Eden.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Namibia: Sands of Time
programme.desc: Namibia is an arid, rough land. However, it has been inhabited for thousands of years, by people as well as animals, and shows no sign of losing popularity with either.

programme.title: Legendary
programme.desc: Cal Chetley is a bright, engaging, undersized fifteen year-old who's been picked on most of his life. Cal joins his high school wrestling team in the hopes his brother will train him. More importantly, Cal uses wrestling as the tool to reunite his family.

programme.title: Mad Money
programme.desc: Deep inside the most secure bank in America, three desperate women from very different worlds cook up the most unlikely heist of the century: Smuggle out millions of dollars in worn-out currency headed for a Federal Reserve shredder every day.

programme.title: LOL
programme.desc: Anne (Demi Moore) deals with life as a working mother and raising her teen, Lola, (Miley Cyrus) who seems to be growing up faster than expected.

programme.title: We Were Soldiers
programme.desc: The story of the first major battle of the American phase of the Vietnam War, and the soldiers on both sides that fought it. Feat: Mel Gibson.

programme.title: A Bronx Tale
programme.desc: A father becomes worried when a local gangster befriends his son in the Bronx in the 1960s.

programme.title: Miss Meadows
programme.desc: Schoolteacher Miss Meadows is not entirely what she appears. Well-mannered, sweet, and caring; but underneath the candy-sweet exterior hides the soul of a vigilante, taking it upon herself to right the wrongs in this world by whatever means necessary.

programme.title: Good Time Max
programme.desc: Suspenseful, twisty and starring award-winning James Franco (127 Hours). Meet brothers Adam and Max. Leading a successful medical career, Adam prescribes drugs, while hedonistic Max, deals drugs.

programme.title: Whip It
programme.desc: In Bodeen, Texas, an indie-rock loving misfit finds a way of dealing with her small-town misery after she discovers a roller derby league in nearby Austin.

programme.title: Playing for Keeps
programme.desc: George is a retired soccer pro whose glory days are behind him. Burnt out on his playboy lifestyle and bankrupted by a string of bad investments, he moves back to Virginia to reconnect with his estranged ex-wife and neglected son.

programme.title: Danger Death Ray
programme.desc: Danger Death Ray: A slick secret agent investigates an evil organization that stole a top secret death ray.

programme.title: Ring of Terror
programme.desc: A medical student (played by George B. Mather) is tormented by a frat-house hazing after being asked to remove a ring from the finger of a corpse.

programme.title: Monster A-Go-Go
programme.desc: The search for an astronaut on an alien planet.

programme.title: The Crawling Eye
programme.desc: Things start to look eerily familiar to scientists Crevett and Brooks when mountain climbers begin losing their heads in the Trollenberg Mountains.

programme.title: Girl in Gold Boots
programme.desc: A girl from rural California goes to Los Angeles to work as a go-go dancer, but soon gets involved with drug dealers.

programme.title: King Dinosaur
programme.desc: In King Dinosaur, the crew pokes fun as scientists are terrorized by snakes, bugs, and dinosaurs on a newly discovered planet.

programme.title: The Human Duplicators
programme.desc: An alien takes over a professor's mansion-basement laboratory, and makes android clones to infiltrate the government.

programme.title: Attack of the Giant Leeches
programme.desc: Hillbilllies, holo-clowns and a giant leech named Patches abound when Joel and the Bots take on this bloodsucking tale from director, Roger Corman.

programme.title: Giant Spider Invasion
programme.desc: Mike and the 'bots suffer through The Giant Spider Invasion (1975).

programme.title: The Beatniks
programme.desc: When a hold-up carried out by his hoodlum friends goes tragically awry, Eddie Crane’s bright future as a recording artist could be in jeopardy.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Buttastic Journey / Monkey See, Monkey Kung Fu
programme.desc: McGee is shrunk down to the size of an atom!
programme.sub-title: Buttastic Journey / Monkey See, Monkey Kung Fu

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: McGee.T / The Great Tiki Hunt
programme.desc: McGee befriends a frog-like alien creature that crash lands close by Camp Lakebottom.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Bite of the Buttsquat / Sword of Ittibiticus
programme.desc: No one believes McGee's suspicion that the suddenly ultra-cool Buttsquat is a campyre.
programme.sub-title: Bite of the Buttsquat / Sword of Ittibiticus

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Head Two Head / The Last of the Wild
programme.desc: Suzi and Gretchen get fused into a two-headed Gruzi!
programme.sub-title: Head Two Head / The Last of the Wild

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Trouble In Spit Creek / The Spy Who Squatched Me
programme.desc: During a game of Stink Toss, McGee and Buttsquat get lost in the forest for what feels like days!
programme.sub-title: Trouble In Spit Creek / The Spy Who Squatched Me

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Pod Parents / Zombie Scouts
programme.desc: Suzi, desperate to get McGee sent home, invites her parents for a visit to Camp Lakebottom.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Pranks for Nothing / Zombie Dearest
programme.desc: Eager to regain his lost prank mojo, McGee releases a mischievous pixy named Hanky Pranky.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Valley of the Iguanasquat / Legend of Wiggly's Gold
programme.desc: When the campers discover a prehistoric valley near Stinky Pits they also find a cursed gem.
programme.sub-title: Valley of the Iguanasquat / Legend of Wiggly's Gold

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Slugfight / Izomborg
programme.desc: The campers must travel back in time to prevent Grandpappy Black Butt from stealing the deed.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: It's a Headless Horse, Man / Voyage to the Bottom of the Deep
programme.desc: McGee is thrilled when he wins a mounted horse head.
programme.sub-title: It's a Headless Horse, Man / Voyage to the Bottom of the Deep

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Eclipsalypso / Apocalypse Squirt
programme.desc: McGee summons the Moon Dervish who will bring the Apocalypse unless a sasquatch dances for him.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Scare-A-Normal-Activity / Beast Feast
programme.desc: McGee vows to protect Lakebottom's secrets from the prying host of 'Paranormal Confronter.'

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Seven Foot itch / Being McGee
programme.desc: Squirt ressurects his pet lousy from the grave.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: McGee's First Flush / House of Ear Wax
programme.desc: Two of McGee and Suzi's former pets "Ocean Apes" return for vengeance and are mutated in all kinds of horrible ways! Squirt's chronic ear wax issues escalate as his giant ball of wax seems to take on a mind of its own.
programme.sub-title: McGee's First Flush / House of Ear Wax

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Schwampbillies / Remember Fort Sunny Bottom
programme.desc: When McGee, Gretchen and Squirt find themselves lost deep in the schwamp.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Sweat, Hot Lakebottom Summer / The S'Mogre
programme.desc: A heat wave forces McGee to sneak a dab of Sawyer's anti-sweat cream. After trying to cheer up Armand, McGee creates a s'more so big, it topples and coats him in delicious goo.
programme.sub-title: Sweat, Hot Lakebottom Summer / The S'Mogre

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Duh'Rehka / Chore Leave
programme.desc: While chasing his gopher-nemesis, Sawyer gets zapped into his brain bin and emerges super smart!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Clockwork Slime / Ride the Haunted Howler
programme.desc: The Campers find a time travelling clock on the beach!
programme.sub-title: Clockwork Slime / Ride the Haunted Howler

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Bird Brains / The Real Vincent
programme.desc: Squirt is eager to assist his idol, Dr. Sapstein on his latest quest for the rare mocker bird.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Messy Bessie / Nanny Num Nums
programme.desc: The campers build a race car to help Sawyer relive his pro-racing days.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Ice Queen / Live and Let Squatch
programme.desc: When the campers try to reclaim their stolen Lakebottom items.
programme.sub-title: Ice Queen / Live and Let Squatch

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: The Day Squirt Stood Still / Anti Gravity
programme.desc: The campers track down a UFO inhabited by an alien from the planet Squipiter.
programme.sub-title: The Day Squirt Stood Still / Anti Gravity

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Cluck of the Were-Chicken / Gnome Force
programme.desc: When a hulking were-chicken stalks the camp, McGee must lead the hunt to prove his innocence.
programme.sub-title: Cluck of the Were-Chicken / Gnome Force

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: McGee the Mermaid / Welcome to Buttcon
programme.desc: The kids accidentally resurrect an evil mermaid who floods the camp.
programme.sub-title: McGee the Mermaid / Welcome to Buttcon

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: S.P.U.D.S / Monster Hunters "R" Us
programme.desc: McGee, Gretchen and Squirt disturb the potato King!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Late Afternoon of the Living Gitch / Mindsuckers from the Depths
programme.desc: When Squirt's stinky underwear is washed in toxic cleanser, the gitch comes alive.
programme.sub-title: Late Afternoon of the Living Gitch / Mindsuckers from the Depths

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Fright Club / Bottomdome
programme.desc: The campers discover an enchanted flashlight.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Are You My Mommy? / Slimey Come Home
programme.desc: The Campers and Buttsquat come across an ancient pyramid inhabited by mummy's.
programme.sub-title: Are You My Mommy? / Slimey Come Home

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Marshmallow Madness / 28 Suzi's Later
programme.desc: Armand goes into a feeding frenzy when wild marshmallows give the campers a rash.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Who's Ghouling Who? / The Adominable Dr. Squatch
programme.desc: McGee accidentally summons Percy, a ghost with a very 'fiery' personality.
programme.sub-title: Who's Ghouling Who? / The Adominable Dr. Squatch

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Bloody Marty / Ghost In The Mower
programme.desc: The kids ignore Rosebuds warning and summon Bloody Marty from the ominous mirror world.
programme.sub-title: Bloody Marty / Ghost In The Mower

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Lakebo-tron / Rise of the Dawn of the Beginning of the Planet of Armand!
programme.desc: McGee and Buttsquat go head-to-head in an 80's style arcade game! But as the points build up, the boys become digitized inside the game. The kids head back through the Lakebottom inter-dimensional portal, hoping to find a Sasquatch version of the camp.
programme.sub-title: Lakebo-tron / Rise of the Dawn of the Beginning of the Planet of Armand!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Golfadoom / There is Something About Mamba
programme.desc: McGee, Gretchen and Buttsquat must beat Haggis MacJockstrap in golf!
programme.sub-title: Golfadoom / There is Something About Mamba

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Jaws of Old Toothy / Arachnattack
programme.desc: When Sawyer closes the beach because of a giant fish, McGee vows to rid the lake of "Old Toothy".

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: The Superfantastic Mega-Buds / It Came From My Nose

programme.sub-title: The Superfantastic Mega-Buds / It Came From My Nose

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Itchy Witchy Pizza Project / Breakout From Buttvault B

programme.sub-title: Itchy Witchy Pizza Project / Breakout From Buttvault B

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Tooth Troll / Hive and Seek
programme.desc: Squirt is captured by a Tooth Troll!

programme.desc: McGee and Squirt are flabbergasted when Gretchen's parents turn out to be the famous action-star couple, the Gritchersons! The kids discover an interdimensional portal to travel back and forth between parallel Lakebottom dimensions.

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 184
programme.desc: Will an explosion in a sewer launch a manhole cover as seen in many Hollywood films? Can truck bedliner withstand a car crash, a dog bite and an explosion?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 220
programme.desc: Can you herd cats? Can you catch a greased pig? Can you stuff 10 pounds of feces into a 5-pound bag?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 176
programme.desc: What can a driver use to replace a flat tire without a spare? Can a fishing reel catch fire with a fast enough fish on the line?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 140
programme.desc: Can you mail a coconut without packaging? Can you make a candle out of earwax? Can you make someone urinate involuntarily by putting their hand in a bowl of warm water while they sleep?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 153
programme.desc: Can a person be launched 115 feet into a kiddie pool from a giant waterslide? Can a mail delivery truck taking only right turns save gas?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 16
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a person take to the skies using only a lawn chair and weather balloons? Can someone test positive for heroin by eating a large amount of poppy seeds?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 69
programme.desc: Myths tested: Is anti-gravity possible? Can too many lights on a Christmas tree cause it to light on fire? Can vodka help to ease the pain of a jellyfish sting?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 99
programme.desc: Myths tested: Will a flaming trail of gasoline from a moving vehicle catch up to its tank and cause it to explode? Can a person be burned by a defibrillator if they are wearing a nipple ring?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 128
programme.desc: Could a skydiver whose parachute failed to open hit a playground seesaw and send a small girl flying seven stories high...and she could still survive?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 95
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a person's eyes pop out while sneezing with eyes open? Can shifting to reverse stop a runaway car? Can three cigarette butts fired from a black-powder rifle kill a person?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 108
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a person slide down a steel cable using a pair of blue jeans? Does eye black help athletes see? Can a tree be cut down using a machine gun?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 86
programme.desc: Every so often, the MythBusters draw conclusions that leave the fans seething. It’s time for the MythBusters to put more of their most contentious outcomes under the microscope.

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 8
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a car in which a person has died and started to decay become so malodorous that it is be impossible to remove the stench and sell?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 4
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a penny dropped from the top of the Empire State Building kill a person or penetrate the ground? Can a person's internal organs be cooked by a tanning booth?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 112
programme.desc: Can steak be tenderized with explosives? Does driving while angry decrease fuel efficiency?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 204
programme.desc: Are people actually well-acquainted with the backs of their own hands? Can a needle be thrown through a glass pane without shattering it? Is it really impossible to ride a bicycle underwater?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 213
programme.desc: If a single car brakes lightly, can it cause a ripple that triggers a major traffic jam? Is it better to stay in one lane in heavy traffic instead of changing lanes?

programme.title: Fear Factor: Underwater Safe Save, Tongue Bob and Transfer, Truck Car Ramp
programme.desc: Contestants will be locked in a plexi-glass box that will be hung from a crane, lowered into the water.
programme.sub-title: Underwater Safe Save, Tongue Bob and Transfer, Truck Car Ramp

programme.title: Fear Factor: Bike Plank Between Box Trailers,Tomato Horn Worm Juice,Teeter Totter
programme.desc: Contestants ride a bicycle on top of semi trucks, squeeze the juices out of hornworms, and walk on a beam between buildings in this jaw-dropping episode.
programme.sub-title: Bike Plank Between Box Trailers,Tomato Horn Worm Juice,Teeter Totter

programme.title: Fear Factor: Jet Ski To Float Plane, Eel Helmet, Donkey Kong
programme.desc: In one bizarre stunt from this episode, contestants must wear a helmet filled with moray eels. In another, they ride on a moving platform to retrieve flags.
programme.sub-title: Jet Ski To Float Plane, Eel Helmet, Donkey Kong

programme.title: Fear Factor: Dual Heli Disc, Spider Head, Sinking Counter Balance
programme.desc: Contestants will be placed into a helmet filled with spiders in one horrifying stunt, then couples will be bound to a platform by their ankles in another.
programme.sub-title: Dual Heli Disc, Spider Head, Sinking Counter Balance

programme.title: Fear Factor: Water Paddle, Fear Factor Bar, Heli Surfing
programme.desc: A contestant will be strapped by their waist, ankles, and wrists then locked to the face of a wheel, half underwater. Contestants must also stand on a swaying platform hanging from a helicopter in this sibling-themed episode.
programme.sub-title: Water Paddle, Fear Factor Bar, Heli Surfing

programme.title: Fear Factor: Tesla Coil Beam, Witches Brew, Bug Tumbler
programme.desc: Contestants will walk across a truss suspended above the ground wearing chain mail, shoot a flaming arrow at a scarecrow target, and be placed in a coffin filled with bugs.
programme.sub-title: Tesla Coil Beam, Witches Brew, Bug Tumbler

programme.title: Fear Factor: Tram Cargo Net Climb, Rat Stew, Dual Suspended Heli Wall
programme.desc: Contestants will climb out of the moving tram and grab a net attached to the tram. Contestants will drink a shake consisting of rats. A plexi-glass wall with a lip hangs under the helicopter and they must traverse the wall releasing flags along the way.
programme.sub-title: Tram Cargo Net Climb, Rat Stew, Dual Suspended Heli Wall

programme.title: Fear Factor: Seperating Platform Transfer, Underwater Cage Escape, Siphon Dump Transfer, Jet Ski Launch
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on opposite platforms suspended in the air. Contestants will be locked in a cage and hung from a crane. Contestant will have to siphon fluid out of containers and into a funnel. A contestant will cross a beam above ground.
programme.sub-title: Seperating Platform Transfer, Underwater Cage Escape, Siphon Dump Transfer, Jet Ski Launch

programme.title: Fear Factor: Rolling Flag Snag, Sand Crab Panning, Suspended Car Rotisserie
programme.desc: Contestants will stand on a car suspended over the water by a crane and more in this exciting episode.
programme.sub-title: Rolling Flag Snag, Sand Crab Panning, Suspended Car Rotisserie

programme.title: Fear Factor: Submerged Tubes, Blind Leech Wall, Suspended Log Roll
programme.desc: A blindfolded contestant will be guided by their partner's verbal commands to a tank filled with leeches. Contestants will also stand on a tube being suspended in the air from a crane.
programme.sub-title: Submerged Tubes, Blind Leech Wall, Suspended Log Roll

programme.title: Fear Factor: Extreme Helicopter Rings, Bug Ropes, Inverted Vacuum
programme.desc: Contestants will lick bugs off of ropes and more in this exciting, revolting episode.
programme.sub-title: Extreme Helicopter Rings, Bug Ropes, Inverted Vacuum

programme.title: Fear Factor: Dingy Net Grab, Walk The Plank, Turkey Feast, Under Boat Flag Grab
programme.desc: Contestants will face wild stunts in and out of water as well as a nasty Thanksgiving dinner: Fear Factor style.
programme.sub-title: Dingy Net Grab, Walk The Plank, Turkey Feast, Under Boat Flag Grab

programme.title: Fear Factor: Sinking Room Escape, Santa's Worst Nightmare, Pipe Ramp Roof Slide
programme.desc: Contestants will be bound to a chair suspended over the water. Then, dressed in a dog bite protection suit, contestants must climb out of a chimney and face Santa's worst Christmas ever in this special holiday episode.
programme.sub-title: Sinking Room Escape, Santa's Worst Nightmare, Pipe Ramp Roof Slide

programme.title: Fear Factor: Tarzan Semi To Semi, Fear Factor Donut Shop, Falling Beam Maze
programme.desc: Contestants stand on top of moving trucks, then play a game to determine how many disgusting donuts they will have to eat.
programme.sub-title: Tarzan Semi To Semi, Fear Factor Donut Shop, Falling Beam Maze

programme.title: Fear Factor: Helicopter Couples Hang, Tuna Transfer
programme.desc: In one couples' stunt, the male contestants will be hung by their ankles under helicopters. In another, each team will be in their own massive trough filled with fish guts, squid, and fish scales.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Double Eat & Yank, Gross Catapult
programme.desc: In one couples' stunt, the contestants will stand at a podium on the roof of a 5 story building. The first contestant loads a piece of cow stomach onto a catapult, which will then launch the stomach down to their partner.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Blind Driving Race To Truck,Double Tunnel Flush
programme.desc: A male contestant's head is placed through a hole cut into the bottom of a slightly angled sewer pipe with his arms shackled around the outside of the pipe, among other exciting stunts.
programme.sub-title: Blind Driving Race To Truck,Double Tunnel Flush

programme.title: Fear Factor: Weighted Ski Boot Rescue, Block Head
programme.desc: Laying face down on the floor, contestants' heads will be placed in separate medieval looking helmets, filled with snakes and rats. In another stunt, one of the contestants will be seated on a platform above water wearing weighted boots.
programme.sub-title: Weighted Ski Boot Rescue, Block Head

programme.title: Fear Factor: Fear Factor Triathlon, Electric Maze
programme.desc: Contestants will each be standing on the back of a flatbed truck driving down the edge of a pier. Contestant must guide their blindfolded partner through a maze of electrical tripwires.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Suspension
programme.desc: A furious Joe fights against a federal suspension that will prevent him from carrying passengers for the first time in 20 years.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Cause for Celebration
programme.desc: AJ and Candace get married in the Ice Castle. A frustrated Chuck tries to get the Electra to pay her way. A flummoxed Mikey tries to bake a cake for Joe's birthday.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Transatlantic Crossing
programme.desc: The Turkey crew makes the critical jump over the North Atlantic. But en route to Portugal, one crew is forced to turn back.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Thin Ice
programme.desc: C-46 and DC-4 crews race against the spring melt to fly mining equipment to an airstrip on a frozen lake.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: The Crash
programme.desc: After thousands of hours of painstaking preparation and dangerous flying, a terrible accident devastates the waterbomber crew in Turkey - and everyone at Buffalo.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Change of Seasons
programme.desc: When her husband quits after a blowout with Joe, Kelly is put in a terrible position. Will she stay at Buffalo - or will she go?

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Up In the Air
programme.desc: After her husband's acrimonious departure from Buffalo, Kelly has a confrontation that decides whether she, too, will quit.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Frozen Four
programme.desc: As Joe fights a Transport Canada claim against the airline, star pilot Justin is tasked with shipping an 8,000lb generator to a remote town. But a controversial decision results in the DC-4 becoming stranded and frozen solid on a High Arctic airstrip.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: When a deadly fire destroys a northern outpost a week before Christmas, Buffalo puts everything aside to come to the rescue. Cargo Manager Kelly receives a shocking diagnosis that renews her fight to quit smoking.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Under Pressure
programme.desc: Ice Pilots is about an eccentric airline and its motley crew that fly vintage planes on impossible arctic missions. Buffalo Airways attracts young pilots seeking Arctic adventure and the chance to fly big, old, piston powered aircrafts from a bygone era.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: The Right Stuff
programme.desc: Ice Pilots is about an eccentric airline and its motley crew that fly vintage planes on impossible arctic missions. Buffalo Airways attracts young pilots seeking Arctic adventure and the chance to fly big, old, piston powered aircrafts from a bygone era.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: The River Lift
programme.desc: Ice Pilots is about an eccentric airline and its motley crew that fly vintage planes on impossible arctic missions. Buffalo Airways attracts young pilots seeking Arctic adventure and the chance to fly big, old, piston powered aircrafts from a bygone era.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Don't Muck with Chuck
programme.desc: Crusty mechanic Chuck leads the scramble to ready the Electra for a disaster relief mission in Haiti, but fate's curveball sends them to the High Arctic instead.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: The Finish Line
programme.desc: A mission to the Far North has Devan, Scott and Adam facing a series of obstacles. From an oil-spewing engine on one plane to a gas-guzzling engine on another, it's an ongoing battle to maintain fluid levels as they circuit their destinations.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Ski Plane
programme.desc: Young pilots AJ and Andrew get the chance of a lifetime to fly the magnificent DC-3 specially equipped with skis to land on frozen strips.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Buffalo Scores
programme.desc: Buffalo scores the charter of a lifetime when they're asked to transport the Stanley Cup on a tour of the North. Cup fever spreads quickly around Buffalo, and for Mikey, what begins as an innocent love for this hockey icon soon becomes an obsession.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Special Delivery
programme.desc: Chief Pilot Arnie lands the DC-3 on a homemade sand strip at a remote lodge. Electra expert Chuck goes one-on-one with a stubborn power unit, and Rod's wife Sasha goes into labour with the newest member of the McBryan family.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Yukon
programme.desc: When thunderstorms and a shaking engine threaten a DC-3 charter to Whitehorse, Joe pulls out all the stops to get the passengers to their destination. Patient C-46 co-pilot Scott Blue finally gets his crack at the DC-4.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: British Invasion
programme.desc: Joe and Mikey head off to Coventry, England to navigate the potential purchase of an Electra turboprop to add to Buffalo's fleet of fire-fighting tanker planes. The father-son duo makes a great team.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Signs of Doom, Part 1
programme.desc: Yusei, Jack and Crow face off against Goodwin in the ultimate Shadow Duel showdown.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Signs of Doom, Part 2
programme.desc: With the safety of the world hanging in the balance, Yusei, Jack and Crow look to tip the scales in their favor by setting their sights on Goodwin's Earthbound Immortal.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Signs of Doom, Part 3
programme.desc: With his life points running on empty, Yusei looks to rev it up one last time in order to defeat Goodwin and save the world from the destructive powers of the King of the Netherworld!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A New Threat: Part I
programme.desc: A mysterious new threat arrives on the scene in New Domino City, forcing Yusei to take to the streets and track down a rogue Turbo Duelist known as The Ghost.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: With his life points on the line, Yusei must figure out a way to take down Ghost's Meklord Emperor Wisel before Wisel's special ability throws his game and his runner into a tailspin.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Lessons Learned
programme.desc: When Vice Chancellor Rudolph Heitmann threatens to expel all the members of Leo and Luna's class from Duel Academy, Yusei attempts to teach the teacher a valuable lesson by challenging the Vice Chancellor to a duel to keep his friends in school.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Trash Talk
programme.desc: When Crow is asked to convince an old friend of Martha's to move into her retirement home, Crow decides to tackle the task by challenging the old man to a trash-talking junkyard duel. Can Crow convince the old man to relocate?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A Duel with Interest
programme.desc: When a loan shark starts sinking his teeth into New Domino City, Jack decides to reel in this money-grubbing menace for good by putting his most prized possessions on the line in a duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Wicked Spirits
programme.desc: When Leo and Luna decide to go exploring a nearby forest rumored to be haunted by wicked spirits, they soon discover that the rumors are all too real when a mysterious boy traps Luna in his house and challenges Leo to a duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: French Twist: Part I
programme.desc: Yusei wakes up to find himself trapped in the back of a big rig with a bump on his head and no way out. After a mysterious tip leads Akiza to Yusei's location, the two friends soon find themselves Turbo Dueling an unfamiliar foe.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: French Twist: Part II
programme.desc: As the battle between Yusei and Sherry races on, Sherry reveals some shocking secrets about the upcoming World Racing Grand Prix. Meanwhile, Akiza begins to gain a new understanding and appreciation for Turbo Dueling while riding shotgun to Yusei.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Synchro Straits
programme.desc: Before heading out to the event of the year - The World Racing Grand Prix Gala - Yusei challenges Jack to a Turbo Duel in the hopes of finding a new dueling strategy that doesn't involve the use of Synchro Monsters.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Synchro Solution
programme.desc: A mysterious duelist named Vizor offers to show Yusei a new dueling strategy known as The Synchro Solution.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Acceleration
programme.desc: Akiza goes to get her Turbo Dueling license, but before she can drive off into the sunset, she first has to out-duel, out-maneuver and out-smart one of Sector Security's finest for her final exam.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Syd is Vicious
programme.desc: After a string of Duel Runner thefts has New Domino City on high alert, Jack Atlas decides to take justice into his own hands and ventures out in search of those responsible.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Dawn of the Duel Board: Part I
programme.desc: When a mysterious new student gives Luna a-one-of-a-kind Duel Board, Leo, trusting his instincts, steps up and tries to pull a 180 on their friendship.
programme.sub-title: Dawn of the Duel Board: Part I

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Dawn of the Duel Board: Part II
programme.desc: As the Duel Board battle between Leo, Luna and the mystery duelist continues, Leo soon realizes that their mysterious opponent is actually an all-too-familiar friend.
programme.sub-title: Dawn of the Duel Board: Part II

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Jack and Crow set out to find a restless Yusei - hoping to ease his mind and reinforce the friendship they share by Turbo Dueling down memory lane.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Super Genius
programme.desc: A mysterious amnesiac helps Yusei build a new engine program for his Runner, but before they can test it out, a make-up-wearing, noodle-eating crook runs off with the file.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Get With the Program: Part I
programme.desc: Yusei and the gang trail Lazar to the local mall hoping to reacquire the engine design program that this window-shopping, noodle-eating crook stole from them.
programme.sub-title: Get With the Program: Part I

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Get With the Program: Part II
programme.desc: Yusei and Lazar are trapped in a warehouse where their only chance of escaping is if Yusei can outduel a Guard Bot whose CPU has been uploaded with all of Yusei's battle techniques.
programme.sub-title: Get With the Program: Part II

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Will The Real Jack Atlas, Please Stand Up: Part I
programme.desc: After being charged with crimes he didn't commit, Jack Atlas scrambles to uncover the truth before his friends and fans turn their back on him for good.
programme.sub-title: Will The Real Jack Atlas, Please Stand Up: Part I

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Will The Real Jack Atlas, Please Stand Up: Part II
programme.desc: With Jack Atlas on the run, Yusei and Crow set out in search of their pal, hoping to clear his good name before bad turns to worse.
programme.sub-title: Will The Real Jack Atlas, Please Stand Up: Part II

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Mother Knows Best
programme.desc: When Zora's stubborn son Leon suddenly returns home, Crow picks a duel with him to help him realize that the ongoing quarrel he has with his mother is much ado about nothing.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Duelist For Hire
programme.desc: When Yusei heads to a tumbleweed town at the request of some locals, he quickly finds himself in the middle of two feuding families - with his old friend Kalin right there with him!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Showdown at Sundown: Part I
programme.desc: When Yusei challenges Kalin to a duel, he hopes to save his old acquaintance from a terrible fate. However, the dueling gets dicey when it becomes clear that Kalin doesn't necessarily want to be saved!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Showdown at Sundown: Part II
programme.desc: As Yusei continues to duel his best to save Kalin from a most unhappy ending, he suddenly finds himself double crossed by his supposed allies and in desperate need of some saving of his own!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Race to Escape: Part I
programme.desc: After being double crossed and sent to the mines by his supposed allies, Yusei hatches a plan to escape. Can Yusei find a way out, or will he and Kalin be forced to work the mines forever?
programme.sub-title: The Race to Escape: Part I

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Race to Escape: Part II
programme.desc: It's a high-speed minecart chase as Kalin and Yusei scramble to rescue Sergio's family from the clutches of the Crash Town mine. When Lawton and his goons gain up on the fleeing family, things take a heartbreaking turn.
programme.sub-title: The Race to Escape: Part II

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Clash at Crash Town: Part I
programme.desc: The sinister Lawton has captured West and Nico and gained control of Crash Town, but Yusei and Kalin have no intention of letting him get away with it. It's the ultimate showdown as the dueling duo confront Lawton in a winner-takes-all battle.
programme.sub-title: Clash at Crash Town: Part I

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Clash at Crash Town: Part II
programme.desc: As the clash between Lawton, Yusei and Kalin comes to a climactic close, Yusei and Kalin must figure out a way to defeat Lawton before his deck destroys their dreams of freeing everyone in the mines.
programme.sub-title: Clash at Crash Town: Part II

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Question of the Card
programme.desc: When Sherry breaks into a city building in search of answers about a very special duel card, she finds a lot more than she bargained for.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Keeping a Promise: Part I
programme.desc: When Crow looks to avenge a missing colleague, he ends up finding an old friend who turns out not to be what he seems.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Keeping a Promise: Part II
programme.desc: Crow takes on an old friend in a duel to determine the truth about a colleague's mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Natural Instincts: Part I
programme.desc: A little fender bender turns into a friendly duel when Crow smashes into one of Team Unicorn's duelists on the tournament practice lanes only this was no accident and Team Unicorn's intentions are anything but friendly.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Natural Instincts: Part II
programme.desc: New threats are on the horizon and no one can be trusted. Sherry arrives to inform Yusei that she suspects the sinister forces of Iliaster have infiltrated the tournament.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Power Plays
programme.desc: Can Jack and his power-packed deck bring down his opponent or will Andre's secret plan place Jack and Team 5D's on the brink of elimination?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Trouble for Team 5D's
programme.desc: With Team Unicorn taking the early lead against Team 5D's, all eyes turn to Akiza as she takes to the track hoping to take down Andre and even up the score.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Edge of Elimination: Part I
programme.desc: With Jack and Akiza already defeated, Yusei finds himself having to defeat all three members of Team Unicorn on his own. Can Yusei come up with a comeback that will wrangle the win away from Team Unicorn?
programme.sub-title: The Edge of Elimination: Part I

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Edge of Elimination: Part II
programme.desc: Yusei must figure out a way to defeat all three members of Team Unicorn before his deck is drained of all its duel cards.
programme.sub-title: The Edge of Elimination: Part II

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Edge of Elimination: Part III
programme.desc: In the climactic conclusion to the first round of the World Racing Grand Prix, Yusei must figure out a way to defeat Team Catastrophe's captain before all the cards in his deck disappear.
programme.sub-title: The Edge of Elimination: Part III

programme.title: Gloves Off
programme.desc: Following his boxing trainer’s sudden death during his championship fight, Doug has inherited a crumbling debt-ridden gym, packed full of a mixed bag of crazy would-be pugilists.

programme.title: Dan in Real Life
programme.desc: In this down-to-earth dramedy, a widowed advice columnist and single father (Steve Carell) falls in love with a French beauty (Juliette Binoche) only to discover she is dating his brother.

programme.title: Killing Dad
programme.desc: One of the all-time great British black comedies! A man goes looking for his long lost dad – only to meet a voracious older woman who is, apparently, the sex bomb of Southend.

programme.title: Blue Iguana
programme.desc: Ex-jailbirds Eddie and Paul are on parole and working in a New York diner. Their lives are a dead end. That is, until English lawyer Katherine Rookwood walks into the diner with an offer they can't refuse. Feat: Sam Rockwell.

programme.title: Orgazmo
programme.desc: From the creators of South Park comes raunchy superhero sex comedy "Orgazmo," the story of mild-mannered Mormon Joe Young and his crime-fighting adult film alter-ego Orgazmo. Starring: Trey Parker, Matt Stone

programme.title: Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Teenager Rick Stevens has a crush on Nina Pennington. They form a friendship and embark on a rock n' roll journey together while Nina deals with her overbearing boyfriend, Kevin. Starring: Nat Wolff, Selena Gomez, Mary-Louise Parker

programme.title: Homegrown
programme.desc: When the leader of their dope-growing operation gets rubbed out, three inept underlings try to take over. Starring Billy Bob Thornton, Ryan Phillippe, Jamie Lee Curtis and John Lithgow.

programme.title: Employee of the Month
programme.desc: Shocking twists follow after bank manager David Walsh is fired, dumped by his fiancée and shot in the span of a day. Starring : Matt Dillon, Steve Zahn, Christina Applegate. (Comedy/Drama)

programme.title: Accidentally Engaged
programme.desc: Famous actor Chas Hunter and aspiring actress Clarissa Byers agree to fake an engagement to improve both their reputations. However, playing pretend starts to feel all too real as the two start to fall for one another.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Stranger in the Blitz
programme.desc: Damaged during the blitz, the location the team investigate was a former war hospital for the injured and wounded, based in Liverpool, UK.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Prisoner of War
programme.desc: Barrow Green H17 Anti-Aircraft Battery build to protect the Liverpool Docks and general area and a former prisoner of war camp, holds some sinister secrets and Ghost Dimension uncover paranormal activity dating back to WW2. What will be caught tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Ammo Store Explosion
programme.desc: Simonswood Supply Depot was one of the main ammunition depots in Lancashire, England during World War II. Located at Simonswood, it was used as an ammunition depot delivered by ROF Kirkby.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Washed Away Air Raid
programme.desc: This abandoned World War Two air raid shelter holds paranormal secrets that haunt anyone that ventures inside. A ghostly entity makes contacts they team uncover the whats behind the hauntings.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Buried inside the Bombing Decoy
programme.desc: A Second World War bombing decoy site at Formby. It was commissioned in December 1940 as a 'Permanent Starfish' site to deflect enemy bombing from the city of Liverpool and it is now home to a whole host of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: WW2 Hospital Haunting
programme.desc: Built in the early 1900’s and now used as offices, a former world war hospital has become the new home for something supernatural. Strange voices, eerie footsteps and the sounds of painful screams have all been reported. What will be uncovered tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Fort Crosby
programme.desc: Crosby Battery, also known as Crosby Point Battery and Fort Crosby, was an artillery battery situated between Crosby and Hightown in Lancashire, United Kingdom. The battery was used for port defence and anti-aircraft defence during WWII.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Gwrych Castle: Supernatural Gateway
programme.desc: Bex and Sean explore Gwrych Castle in Wales, renowned for its hauntings. Amid eerie voices, strange noises, and shadows, they use specialized equipment to unveil the spectral mysteries lurking within. Will they unearth Gwrych Castle's ghostly secrets?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Gwrych Castle: Secrets of the Unknown
programme.desc: In the thrilling conclusion, Bex and Sean return to Gwrych Castle for intense paranormal investigations. Eerie chambers, mysterious apparitions, and chilling whispers await as they seek conclusive otherworldly proof.
programme.sub-title: Gwrych Castle: Secrets of the Unknown

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Phantoms of Formby: Starfish Bunker Unveiled
programme.desc: Join "Ghost Dimension" at Merseyside's Formby Starfish Bunker. Unveil its wartime secrets, encountering eerie whispers, phantom footsteps, and soldier apparitions. Can they capture undeniable proof of the paranormal?
programme.sub-title: Phantoms of Formby: Starfish Bunker Unveiled

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Sands Lake Secrets: Paranormal Mysteries
programme.desc: Explore paranormal phenomena at Sands Lake – from mysterious voices to ghostly encounters. The secrets of this haunting location are unveiled.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Sands Lake Spirits: Haunted Legends
programme.desc: In part two of our Sands Lake investigation, we dive deeper into the unexplained, capturing voices from the beyond and unlocking the lake's mysteries.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Shadows' Whispers: Barn Haunting
programme.desc: Join us as we uncover eerie voices, paranormal encounters, and unsolved mysteries within a barn with a chilling history.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Dark Echoes: Haunted Barn Unveiled
programme.desc: Dive into the unexplained as we explore a barn filled with uncharted spirits, whispers from the other side, and chilling encounters.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Haunting Echoes: Clarke Zoo's Secrets
programme.desc: Join us on a chilling investigation as we unravel the spectral enigmas within Clarke Zoo Gardens. Eerie encounters and eerie secrets await.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Beyond the Veil: Zoo's Ghostly Enigma
programme.desc: In the heart of Clarke Zoo, paranormal activity reigns. We journey deeper, uncovering spine-tingling apparitions and ghostly revelations.
programme.sub-title: Beyond the Veil: Zoo's Ghostly Enigma

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Factory Whispers: Unraveling Unknown
programme.desc: In 'Whispers in the Factory,' our team delves into a historic site, where eerie voices and enigmatic questions haunt every corner. Uncover the mysteries of restless spirits as we journey through a chilling landscape of the unknown.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: The Curse Of The Pendle Witches - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads deep into the Pendle Hills in search of the Pendle Witches that went to trial in 1612 and were hung for witchcraft. The investigation takes an unexpected twist with a stop at the New Inn, Pendles most haunted pub.
programme.sub-title: The Curse Of The Pendle Witches - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: The Curse Of The Pendle Witches - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation of Pendle Hill and ventures even deeper into the hills. The night takes an unexpected turn with a dramatic ending, which he believes was caused by the witches.
programme.sub-title: The Curse Of The Pendle Witches - Part 2

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 7
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a semi in Telford with a strange layout, a difficult piece of land in Letchworth and a former pub in Derby.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view properties in Derby, West London and Plymouth.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 28
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a property in Derbyshire where DIY means Damage It Yourself, in South West London there's trouble with this Battersea property and in Cornwall there's a large house that could turn you on.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a one-bedroom terrace in Kent, a holiday cottage on the coast of Norfolk and a bland property in London.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 25
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a tired and dated semi in Telford, a flat in Margate and return to a magnificent 16 th century house in Derbyshire we first visited 4 ½ years ago.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 10
programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit a large flat in London, a two bedroomed flat in Exeter and a building with a wonderful façade on the Isle of Sheppy.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 15
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a house in Ashbourne, Derbyshire which is full of original Victorian details, a two bedroom bungalow near Reading where the land it sits on is the icing on the cake and there are some questions at a end of terrace house in Wales.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 16
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a cottage in Cornwall, a two bedroomed flat in Hampshire and property in Kent.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts and Lucy Alexander visit homes in Yorkshire, Essex and Norwich.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit properties in Northwest London, Lancashire and Kent.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 20
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit an untouched property in Kent, a flat in East London with a tidy profit to be made and it never drains when it can pour at a house with some drainage problems in Lincoln.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts and Lucy Alexander look at a tower in Plymouth, a compact house in Ham and a mid-terrace in Stoke.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 16
programme.desc: Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts travel to Wiltshire to see a four bedroom house, with a ¼ acre of land. Another four bedroom house in London in desperate need for a make over. Finally a one up one down house in Manchester with lots of potential.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view properties in Derby, Wiltshire and Wales.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 24
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin visit a house in the Yorkshire Dales with spectacular views, then Kent to see whether a plot of land can be redeveloped or if it will remain a piece of greenery in 'The Garden of England'. Finally a terraced property in Audenshaw.

programme.title: The Shape of Things to Come
programme.desc: Sometime in the future, man has set up colonies on the Moon, when Earth becomes uninhabitable. A madman decides to destroy the Moon colonies with his robots and automated ships, and only three people and their robot can stop him.

programme.title: Penny Serenade
programme.desc: A couple's big dreams give way to a life full of unexpected sadness and unexpected joy.

programme.title: Gold
programme.desc: A ruthless global cabal of financial investors plan to manipulate the price of gold by flooding one of South Africa’s top gold mines. Starring: Roger Moore, Susannah York, Ray Milland, Bradford Dillman, Bernard Horsfall, John Hussey

programme.title: Witchcraft
programme.desc: Gary (David Hasselhoff) and Leslie visit a quiet island to conduct research on witchcraft. Jane Brooks (Linda Blair) and family are looking to buy a local mansion. Unable to leave the island, they are subjected to the sadism of an evil witch.

programme.title: The Centerfold Girls
programme.desc: A depraved religious fanatic sets out to punish all the "immoral" women who have posed for the center-fold of a men's magazine.

programme.title: Creepshow 2
programme.desc: Three more bone-chilling tales that include a vengeful wooden Native American, a monstrous blob in a lake, and a hitchhiker who wants revenge and will not die. Starring:George Kennedy, Lois Chiles, Domenick John

programme.title: Satan's Cheerleaders
programme.desc: The janitor at a local high school is actually the scout for a coven of Satanists on the lookout for a virgin to sacrifice. One day he kidnaps the cheerleading squad to use for their rituals. However, one of the cheerleaders is actually a witch.

programme.title: The Cannonball Run
programme.desc: The classic comedy with cool stars and even cooler cars! Based on a true race event, Burt Reynolds leads an all-star cast in the ultimate quest to win The Cannonball Run.

programme.title: The Red House
programme.desc: An old man and his sister are concealing a terrible secret from their adopted teen daughter, concerning a hidden abandoned farmhouse, located deep in the woods.

programme.title: Munchies
programme.desc: Simon Watterman, a space archaeologist, discovers the "Munchies" in a cave in Peru. Cecil Watterman, Simon's evil twin brother and snack food entrepreneur, kidnaps the creature.

programme.title: Hunter: Any Second Now
programme.desc: A concert pianist is paralyzed by fear when a man jailed for her attempted murder is released from prison and vows to complete the task.

programme.title: Hunter: Shades
programme.desc: When Hunter disappears during an investigation of organized crime, McCall and her new partner must find him before he's killed.

programme.title: Hunter: A Child is Born
programme.desc: A rock musician helps Hunter search for the assailant of a pregnant woman being kept alive artificially until doctors can deliver the child, which Sergeant McCall decides to adopt.

programme.title: Hunter: Crossfire
programme.desc: McCall fears that Hunter's temper will outweigh his judgement when his former girlfriend is murdered and Hunter thinks he knows the identity of the killer.

programme.title: Hunter: Hot Pursuit - Part 1
programme.desc: While investigating a murder, McCall is shot and paralyzed after learning about a prostitution ring operating along the highway in a fleet of motor homes.

programme.title: Hunter: Hot Pursuit - Part 2
programme.desc: As doctors prepare to operate on the paralyzed McCall, Hunter races against time to exonerate himself and find whoever is killing potential witnesses in a deadly prostitution case.

programme.title: Hunter: Playing God
programme.desc: After learning the circumstances leading up to the murder of a notorious Latino crime boss, Hunter and McCall face an ethical dilemma: whether to arrest the killer or let him go free.

programme.title: Hunter: The Jade Woman
programme.desc: When Hunter helps a distressed war buddy look for the kidnappers of his mail-order bride, the investigation leads Hunter and McCall to murder and double-cross.

programme.title: Hunter: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Racial tensions mount as Hunter and McCall investigate the accidental shooting by the police of Antonio Elandro, the son of a Hispanic councilman.

programme.title: Hunter: City of Passion - Part 1
programme.desc: Erik Estrada guest stars as a tough-minded detective who joins Hunter and McCall to catch a serial rapist while also investigating the disappearance of a teenage prostitute.

programme.title: Hunter: City of Passion - Part 2
programme.desc: A serial rapist known as Big Foot stalks McCall while Hunter investigates the death of a teenage prostitute who may have had ties to a Satanic cult.

programme.title: Hunter: City of Passion - Part 3
programme.desc: McCall risks losing her job when she fails to report a felony and Hunter tries to trap the killer of a teenage prostitute with possible ties to a Satanic cult.

programme.title: Hunter: The Turning Point
programme.desc: When Hunter and McCall investigate the alleged death of a reporter, they uncover an extortion plot involving a wealthy industrialist who has illicit dealings with a construction firm.

programme.title: Hunter: Hot Prowl
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall become suspicious when a Bel Air housewife refuses to identify the man who robbed her of a million-dollar necklace.

programme.title: Hunter: Allegra
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall investigate the mysterious death of Allegra, Hunter's former girlfriend, to determine if the beautiful young heiress jumped or was pushed from a skyscraper window.

programme.title: Hunter: Renegade
programme.desc: When Hunter investigates a drug ring, his ex-partner, Frank Garriman, becomes a suspect in the murder of the dealers.

programme.title: Hunter: The Black Dahlia
programme.desc: Detective Doyle comes out of retirement to help Hunter and McCall investigate the real-life murder of actress-turned-prostitute Elizabeth Short, who was cut in half 41 years before.

programme.title: Hunter: Not Just Another John Doe
programme.desc: When Hunter and McCall investigate the murder of an unidentified man, their interest is piqued because the victim seemingly never existed -- and the killing appears to be a professional murder.

programme.title: Euronews
programme.desc: Euronews offers a unique perspective on world events. It empowers people to make up their own mind by delivering factual analysis and a diversity of viewpoints. Because all views matter, Euronews is "All Views".

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 5
programme.desc: Jonny Smith and Vicki Butler-Henderson review two mighty 4x4's in one of the shows muddiest Dog Fights. Elsewhere, the team hit the road in the all-new Alpine A110 to find out what's changed since the first incarnation hit our streets back in 1961.r

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 3
programme.desc: Jason Plato is joined by former F1 driver Karun Chandhok as they pit a Honda Civic Type-R, a Seat Leon Cupra-R, a Renault Megane RS and a Audi S3 against one another to see who will be crowned king of the hot-hatches in an all-new Deathmatch

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Car nut Tim Shaw joins the team to tackle ways to spend less money on fuel; Tom tests Ford's new Kuga SUV; Jonny sees if a car is actually worth more as scrap than as a functional vehicle.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 1
programme.desc: In this episode of Fifth Gear, Jonny Smith is in the Netherlands meeting the De Rooy race team who won the 2012 Dakar rally in their 900hp trucks.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim investigates the government's new scrappage system that promises cash in exchange for bangers; Tiff and Jason race a pair of double-decker buses.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny tests the latest Jeep Wrangler to see how it stacks up against the original WWII model; Tim Shaw tackles the car tax; Jason Plato goes behind the wheel of the new Aston Martin V8 Vantage.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 6
programme.desc: Jason Plato is joined by ex-Ferrari F1 driver Mika Salon to pit the brand new £100,000 Mercedes C63 AMG Black Series against its key rival from BMW

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki finds out how quick the police are on a racing track. Then, Jonny loads up some small economy cars to find out of they can still climb one of Britain's biggest hills.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 13
programme.desc: Tiff Needell is joined by rally star Kris Meeke for a hot hatch showdown. With four brand new models lined up at the track, they hold a high octane knockout tournament to find which is fastest of all.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato joins Britain's best downhill skier, Chemmy Alcott, to drive a Group N rally car; Tom Ford drives the Citroen C5 in Lisbon; Tiff takes a look at the latest Subaru Impreza.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 6
programme.desc: Jason Plato is joined by ex-Formula One driver Karun Chandhok to battle it out on the track in two of the most sort-after super sports cars; Porsche 911 GT3 RS vs Nissan GT-R Nismo.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Formula 1 stars Johnny Herbert and Karun Chandhok join Tiff and Jason to rank two four-seater powerhouses; Ben Collins is challenged to compete in an autograss event.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny checks out Volvo's testing facility in Sweden to witness a spectacular 50 mph crash test.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford conducts a shocking crash test that could prove to be essential viewing for family motorists; Tim hits the road with the latest camera alerting systems.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 4
programme.desc: Tiff Needell heads to LA to check out the latest car trend to take the USA – restomodding. It's the art of sympathetically restoring classic cars to modern standards, while retaining their original charm – and Tiff's behind the wheel of LA's best examples

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 8
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson is in Denmark experiencing the exciting world of motorbike speedway with triple world champion Nicki Pederson. Jonny Smith visits Ferrari's hi-tech aluminium factory before taking their latest California supercar out

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim Shaw visits Pit Start, a fully-stocked repair shop with a twist — there are no mechanics.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason and Tiff team up with Ross Noble and Charley Boorman for a series of arduous off-road challenges.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason teaches rugby legend and TV personality Matt Dawson how to drift like a hooligan in a 500 horsepower Audi supercar.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason gets to drive the new trek car from British specialists Westfield; guest presenter Robert Llewellyn drives an electric car from Japan.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In this edition of "Fifth Gear," Vicki Butler-Henderson pits the brand new Audi S5 against the BMW 335i. Then, England rugby star Kyran Bracken is given some circuit driving tuition from Jason Plato.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 1
programme.desc: In the opening show of the new series Jason Plato and Tiff Needell put two tyre shredding saloons against one another other on the track - the Mercedes AMG C63 S and Alfa Romeo Giulia Quadrifoglio.

programme.title: Fifth Gear

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson attends a shootout between two chic superminis: the BMW Mini One and the Fiat 500.

programme.title: Fifth Gear

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While marriage is meant to be for life, it often ends in divorce. These wives took their marriages vow seriously: "till death do us part."

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Nurse Beverley Allitt overdosed multiple infants, Stella Nickell poisoned medicine capsules in stores and Kathleen Follbigg killed four of her own children.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Psychopathic killers lurk in society, mostly acting alone. Sometimes fate brings them into contact with another person who shares their cold power to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women would stop at nothing to get their hands on the cash they needed. From husbands to strangers to other people’s babies, they spilt blood for money.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The path towards revenge can sometimes lead to murder. It can be quick, fiery and violent. It can also be a dish served cold, the product of a calm, calculated plot.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The heaviest judgments of convicted killers are reserved for those who committed premeditated murder. These women plot and plan. They know the consequences of their actions, but still they go forward to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Greed is one of the oldest motives for murder, and these deadly women are no exception: they’ll do anything to satisfy their need for cash. This is the dangerous world of the fortune hunters.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Greed
programme.desc: Known as “black widows,” these women kill their spouses, lovers and children for profit. Murder for them becomes a business. Their trade is murder. Their profit? Blood money.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Some killers are so troubled that their actions are almost impossible to comprehend. Welcome to the shadow land of the insane and psychopathic as we enter the haunting world of the disturbed.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Sometimes the innocence of childhood is swept away by dark thoughts and violent currents. Deep and disturbing psychological impulses will drive a child to kill another child.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Revenge is one of the oldest motives for murder, but these cases are much more than an “eye for an eye.”

programme.title: Deadly Women: Loathe Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Neighbors can be a source of friendship and community comfort. But what happens when a neighbor stops watching out for you, and starts watching you. The sinister minds of these women begin to turn sour and they begin to torment their neighbors.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Twisted Thrills
programme.desc: The intimate thoughts of a twisted mind would be enough to stun a community and horrify the world. But thoughts alone may not be enough to turn someone into a killer. This is a bizarre journey into the world of women who kill for twisted thrills.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Kill For Cash
programme.desc: Money is a strong motivator. It can be used for good. It can be used for evil. It can be the driving force behind murder. These women would stop at nothing to get their hands on the cash they needed.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love Gone Wrong
programme.desc: Love can be beautiful, love can be blind and love can be deadly. Desire and jealousy are powerful forces driving women to dark and horrifying places in their minds.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: In some cases, the transformation from everyday woman to brutal killer is activated by a man. A boyfriend or husband can become the focus of a deadly obsession.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Under His Control
programme.desc: These are love stories with bleak, bloody endings. Blinded by desire, obsessed and malleable, some women fall into lethal relationships with dangerous, controlling men.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: A rifle in a shopping mall, a syringe of potassium chloride and a syringe of insulin, each in the hands of a mentally disturbed woman, lead to the tragic end of many lives.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Women are more often prey than predators, but the exceptions are deadly women indeed. In this episode, we’ll discover what drove these deadly women to prey on the unsuspecting.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Millionaire Murder
programme.desc: A businessman went to Florida to make one last deal before he retired-he never returned home to his millions. Authorities examined who was closest to him and who stood to gain from his disappearance. But this time conventional rules didn't apply.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In 1984, a tragic murder led agents into the frightening world of domestic terrorism. Law enforcement vowed to dismantle the violent faction that claimed responsibility.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Takeover
programme.desc: Two armed bank robbers hit a Seattle bank taking over 150,000 dollars. Before they can escape police confront them and the pair splits up. As authorities search block by block they learn one was a career criminal with a long history of violence.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Paradise
programme.desc: It should have been Shangri-La, but when bad blood developed, piracy took over and the only law was the law of the jungle.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Trail
programme.desc: The disappearance of young women triggered a search that spanned the Pacific Northwest. A massive media campaign failed to locate the drifter, who first charmed then killed them. As investigators followed his trail, he always stayed one step ahead.

programme.title: The FBI Files: First and Kennedy Street Crew
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, Washington, D.C., became the murder capital of the nation. Few were left untouched by gang violence, which was ignited by the drug trade. By 1994, that violence would strike at the very heart of law enforcement.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hired Gun
programme.desc: When three people were found murdered in their home, it appeared like a burglary gone awry. But a crime this horrific deserved a closer look.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The World Trade Center Bombing
programme.desc: Terrorist bombings are what happen in other countries. Not here in the United States. And yet, in 1993, it happened in New York City.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Death in Alaska
programme.desc: The day began like any other for Cheryl and Paul Chapman, until the silence of a peaceful Sunday morning was shattered with a phone call.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Despite what you see in the movies, most bank robbers come in quietly, pass a note, and slip away. They want cash, not bloodshed. But in Richmond, Virginia, a pair of gunmen entered a bank with their guns blazing.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cat and Mouse
programme.desc: He was a predator, abducting girls and young women from their own front yards in broad daylight. He was a sadist: phoning one victim's family, taunting them, boosting then dashing their hope, and he wouldn't stop until we stopped him.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Manhunt
programme.desc: A killer was on the loose in one of America's most popular tourist destinations. Armed and desperate, he evaded law enforcement at every turn. As the Fourth of July weekend quickly approached, thousands of people became potential targets.

programme.title: The FBI Files: John Gotti: Convicted
programme.desc: John Gotti was ambitious, powerful and ruthless. He ruled with flash and conspicuous style, playing celebrity with the media and cat and mouse with the FBI. They called John Gotti the Teflon Don. Serious charges just wouldn't stick.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Master Plan
programme.desc: Willow Springs, Illinois, seemed like any other quiet Midwestern community. But it was really one of the most corrupt places in the nation. This tiny village, nestled just outside of Chicago, was in the hip pocket of organized crime.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Crazy Don
programme.desc: To the FBI, he was believed to be the boss of New York's most powerful mafia organization: the Genovese crime family. Was Gigante crazy or was his behavior a shrewd attempt to disguise his position as a ruthless mafia boss?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Death In The Delta
programme.desc: When a wealthy young woman was abducted in front of her in-laws' home, the police had no shortage of suspects. The 25-year-old victim left behind a tumultuous marriage, an ex-husband and old boyfriends. All were on the FBI's short list.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Secrets

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Alien Abductions
programme.desc: Richard speaks with two alleged alien abductees about their claims they were taken aboard an alien space craft.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: End times prophecy experts discuss the possible identity of the antichrist and the timing of his emergence onto the world state.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard meets members of the 9/11 Truth movement who challenge the official version of events concerning the attack on the U.S. Pentagon. Researchers present evidence to suggest the attack was perpetrated by some rogue element inside the U.S. government.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Two victims of alleged electronic harassment and organized gang-stalking recount their horrible ordeals. Richard investigates possible theories as to who is behind this program and why.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: An investigation into the various conspiracy theories revolving around the tragic death of Diana, The People's Princess, in Paris in August 1997.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Area 51
programme.desc: What's going on inside Area 51, America's most carefully guarded secret? The mysterious military base located 30 minutes north west of Las Vegas has been rumored to be involved in back engineering advanced alien technology recovered from UFO crash sites.

programme.desc: Richard interviews the expedition organizer who is planning on leading a team of scientists, filmmakers and tourists to the Arctic aboard a Russian nuclear ice-breaker in search of an entrance into the interior of our world.

programme.desc: Scores of citizens attend 420 festivals to openly celebrate pot smoking, while others experience tragic consequences, such as citizens who've been arrested, shot and even murdered for mere possession of cannabis.

programme.desc: Richard speaks with the pre-eminent investigators of the alleged crash of a UFO near Roswell, New Mexico in 1947.

programme.desc: The legend of the werewolf throughout history and in various cultures is explored. The Conspiracy Show travels to England and rural Wisconsin to investigate claims of actual werewolf sightings.

programme.desc: Was Presidential hopeful, Robert F. Kennedy really killed by disgruntled Palestinian Sirhan Sirhan as we’ve been led to believe? Or was he another in a long line of Manchurian candidates, a victim of a long standing mind control program.
