programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 4
programme.desc: Tonight's team, Let's Get Medical, are a group of medical students. Your lives may soon be in their hands. You may have concerns after witnessing this lot attempt to tackle the mighty maze.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 1
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade returns with a new series of everyday adventurers hoping to make it to the Crystal Dome, starting with The Gamers.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 5
programme.desc: Tonight's team are called The Vikings because they spend most of their spare time living like Vikings. As they travel through the zones they'll be answering the question, 'can you ever have too much testosterone in a room'?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 2
programme.desc: It's takes self-belief, attitude and quick wits to conquer the maze. Tonight's team, The London Girls, are over-flowing with two of the three. Will Maze Master Richard Ayoade ever be able to keep control of this calamitous and kamikaze bunch?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 6
programme.desc: In tonight’s show Team Well Read and Underfed, a group of plucky students, attempt to take on the maze. Will they graduate with honours?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 8
programme.desc: This week’s team of Welsh hopefuls met working at Pizza Hut. How will they cope with the maze when some of their team appear to have no concept of urgency?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 7
programme.desc: An all-female footballing team hope to score in the maze tonight. Will they play defensively or go on the attack?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 2
programme.desc: The Air Cadets bring a bravado bonanza to the maze this week. They begin the night predicting big things, but will they deliver?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 14
programme.desc: This week it’s the turn of a team of midwives to face the maze. These five feisty females prove how important communication is, by demonstrating the consequences of not listening to each other.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 3
programme.desc: This week Team features a player who took part in the original series twenty six years ago. She won both her games back then…will her 100% record remain intact?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 13
programme.desc: In tonight’s show we see a team of police officers hoping to lay down the law in the maze…but will they end up locked behind bars?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 10
programme.desc: Tonight’s team met on jury service and are looking to deliver justice in the dome. They may have high hopes, but the maze is a law unto itself.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 3
programme.desc: Maze Master Richard Ayoade leads The Holmes Family around the maze as they attempt to win precious crystals and not have a major falling out.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 5
programme.desc: In tonight’s show a team called The Cheerleaders, five disproportionately excitable young ladies, hope enthusiasm will help them in their quest through the maze.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 4
programme.desc: Tonight’s team are huge fans of the original series and have engaged in intensive research on how to tackle the challenges ahead. Sometimes all the preparation in the world can be utterly pointless.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 6
programme.desc: Tonight's team are The Science Nerds, proving that just because you put the words 'science' and 'nerds' in the name of your team does not necessarily mean anyone should expect competence.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 1
programme.desc: The Watsons. How will they cope when one of the team reveals they ‘can’t physically do riddles’?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 11
programme.desc: This week’s team are Black Ice, an AC/DC tribute band from Newcastle. Will they rock the maze or will the physical, mystery, skill and mental challenges prove to be a highway to hell?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Celeb 1 - Big Narstie, Kelly, Greg, Jorgie, Alfie
programme.desc: Olympic legend Dame Kelly Holmes takes charge of grime MC Big Narstie, actress Jorgie Porter, internet superstar Alfie Deyes and fellow gold medallist Greg Rutherford on an action-packed journey to the Crystal Dome.
programme.sub-title: Celeb 1 - Big Narstie, Kelly, Greg, Jorgie, Alfie

programme.title: Mob Wives starts at 9pm
programme.desc: Welcome to Staten Island, the land of fierce women who never admit to being allegedly "connected" - until now. Left alone to pick up the pieces, these women face the harsh realities of "life" after informants have turned their families' lives upside down.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Miami Monkey: Miami Monkey
programme.desc: Big Ang is in South Beach to open a new bar - The Miami Monkey. She enlists the help of her daughter Raquel, Raquel's twenty-something friends from Staten Island, and a team of hot Miami bartenders.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Miami Monkey: Monkey Wrench
programme.desc: When one of the girls has a meltdown, Ang may be one Monkey short. Ang and Raquel then find themselves in the middle of an escalating staff feud.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Miami Monkey: Mo Monkey Mo Problems
programme.desc: At a photo shoot for the Miami Monkey ad campaign, the tequila thief confesses and the staff starts to question who they can trust.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Miami Monkey: Monkey In The Middle
programme.desc: Despite warnings from the NY girls about Morgan, Ang plans a special photo shoot just for her that ends in complete sloppiness.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Miami Monkey: Monkey Business
programme.desc: Morgan is absent from one of Ang's events again and this time Ang takes it personally.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Miami Monkey: A Big Ang Birthday
programme.desc: The staff of the Miami Monkey is faced with growing tension within their group-and at the worst possible time, as they plan a birthday bash for Ang

programme.title: Mob Wives: Miami Monkey: Drama and Drag
programme.desc: After forcing a wedge between the New York girls by sharing gossip with Roxanne and Ryan, Morgan comes up with an idea to secure her place at the bar as well as rise in the ranks in Ang's eyes: Gay Day

programme.title: Mob Wives: Miami Monkey: Worst Team Meeting Ever
programme.desc: After the fight between the girls at Ang's Gay Soiree it's clear that things at the Miami Monkey are not going well. When the gossip continues to spread, no one takes responsibility, and everyone starts pointing fingers

programme.title: Mob Wives: Miami Monkey: Whine Bar
programme.desc: Managing this staff is proving to be a difficult task. Ryan and Marissa can't be in the same room while Cristina and Morgan can't work together. When more drama unfolds at Ang's wine tasting, her and Raquel can't take it anymore

programme.title: Mob Wives: Miami Monkey: Monkeys in Bikinis
programme.desc: Big Ang and her team put together a bikini fashion show at the Miami Monkey. Cristina finally gets up the nerve to confront Morgan one on one, leading to an epic showdown where sparks fly and lines are crossed forever.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Following the 35-year investigation and forensic advances that identify Rosa's savage killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Following the investigation that reveals the predator responsible for numerous sexual assaults.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The story of a sadistic crime and how investigators brought the merciless attacker to justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The murder of Lynette White led to the longest murder trial in British history at the time. Find out how police work and DNA eventually led police to her killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Rachel O'Reilly was savagely murdered in her home, in what looked like a burglary gone wrong. A ground-breaking investigation finally put her killer behind bars.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: A popular, healthy, 60-year-old woman suffered a sudden, painful death. Detectives managed to trace the killer, despite their calculated and elaborate web of deceit.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: A killer, who stalked and gained his victim's trust, enticed her to her death. Almost two decades later scientific advances brought the perpetrator to justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: A man returning from a family visit stops to help what appears to be a stranded group on the Belt Parkway in Brooklyn, NY. Half an hour later, he is found dead.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: On the 5th December 1998, a woman was reported missing. Her car was found shortly after off the Interstate 95. Her disappearance rocked the community and tragically, her body was discovered two days later.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: When Joan Giambra was murdered, DNA technology and dogged police work linked the case to a string of other murders, helping to solve the crime and rectify a miscarriage of justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: When David Castor was found dead, an extensive police investigation - fuelled with the power of forensics and toxicology - uncovered another victim.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: On 31st July 2003, a woman was reported missing after she hadn't been seen or heard from in over a week. Police suspected foul play and after an intensified search, they tracked down her killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: In March 2007, Shamaia Smith failed to return from work in East Hartford, Connecticut. After a few days she was reported missing. An investigation was launched but it became clear she was probably dead.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: December 1986: Helle Craft was reported missing. Police questioned her husband, he claimed she was visiting her mum. From interviews with loved ones it became apparent something sinister had happened.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: In August 2015, Jeanette and Jeffrey Navin were reported missing to police in Easton. An investigation began and it quickly became clear it wasn't a missing persons case, something sinister had happened.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Following the investigation into the murder of Dr. Teresa Sievers, which pioneered a forensic technique that solved the case.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Laura Garza told friends she was going on a night out at the Marquee Club. When she didn't show for work the next day a search ensued to find her as well as the men she left with.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Mary Ann Perez left a bar just outside of New Orleans. Early the next morning, her family received a call from an anonymous woman, mentioning Mary had run into car trouble. She never returned home.

programme.title: South Park: Chinpokomon
programme.desc: Chinpokomon: Stan, Cartman, and Kenny are caught up in the latest fad from Japan, a cartoon called Chinpokomon - but what is the secret plan behind the show's anti-American sentiments...? (S3, E11)

programme.title: South Park: Starvin' Marvin In Space
programme.desc: Starvin' Marvin In Space: Marvin is back! He and the boys travel around the world in an alien spaceship on a food-gathering mission, hotly pursued by the CIA and Sally Struthers. (S3, E13)

programme.title: South Park: Korn's Groovy Pirate Ghost Mystery
programme.desc: Korn's Groovy Pirate Ghost Mystery: The boys are being plagued by the 5th graders and South Park is overrun by Pirate Ghosts. Nu-Metal band Korn must save the day! (Scooby-Doo parody). (S3, E10)

programme.title: South Park: Hooked on Monkey Fonics
programme.desc: Hooked on Monkey Fonics: The boys compete against a couple of home schooled kids in South Park's annual spelling bee. (S3, E12)

programme.title: South Park: The Red Badge of Gayness
programme.desc: The Red Badge of Gayness: Cartman bets the boys he can win a Civil War re-enactment leading the Confederates. When things don't go to plan it's time for a booze fuelled rampage! (S3, E14)

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Hankey's Christmas Classics
programme.desc: Mr. Hankey's Christmas Classics: Join Mr Hankey as he hosts his own variety show from infront of the fire in his sewer home. Features unusual holiday songs such as "Christmas Time In Hell". (S3, E15)

programme.title: South Park: Are You There God? It's Me, Jesus
programme.desc: Are You There God, It's Me Jesus: Cartman claims to be going through puberty, making the boys jealous, and Jesus promises a New Year's Eve spectacle - so books Rod Stewart to play Las Vegas! (S3, E16)
programme.sub-title: Are You There God? It's Me, Jesus

programme.title: South Park: The Red Badge of Gayness
programme.desc: The Red Badge of Gayness: Cartman bets the boys he can win a Civil War re-enactment leading the Confederates. When things don't go to plan it's time for a booze fuelled rampage! (S3, E14)

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Hankey's Christmas Classics
programme.desc: Mr. Hankey's Christmas Classics: Join Mr Hankey as he hosts his own variety show from infront of the fire in his sewer home. Features unusual holiday songs such as "Christmas Time In Hell". (S3, E15)

programme.title: South Park: Are You There God? It's Me, Jesus
programme.desc: Are You There God, It's Me Jesus: Cartman claims to be going through puberty, making the boys jealous, and Jesus promises a New Year's Eve spectacle - so books Rod Stewart to play Las Vegas! (S3, E16)
programme.sub-title: Are You There God? It's Me, Jesus

programme.title: South Park: Worldwide Recorder Concert
programme.desc: Worldwide Recorder Concert: The class visit Mr Garrison's hometown for a recorder concert, where they attempt to find the mysterious 'brown noise'. What part does Kenny G play in this? (S3, E17)

programme.title: South Park: The Tooth Fairy Tats
programme.desc: The Tooth Fairy Tats: Cartman gets $2 from the Tooth Fairy, which leads him to a scheme to buy a new videogame. It's not long before the boys are caught up in the black market tooth racket. (S4, E01)

programme.title: South Park: Cartman's Silly Hate Crime 2000
programme.desc: Cartman's Silly Hate Crime: Things go from bad to worse for Cartman after he throws a rock at Token - it's jail time for this racist! Will the boys win the sled race without lardy on board? (S4, E02)

programme.title: South Park: Timmy 2000
programme.desc: Timmy! 2000: The boys copy Timmy's behaviour (who has ADD) in order to get out of doing homework. Timmy is heading for rock stardom - but not if Phil Collins has anything to do with it! (S4, E03)

programme.title: South Park: Quintuplets 2000
programme.desc: Quintuplets 2000: After seeing the Cirque Du Cheville the boys decide to start their own circus. The Romanian contorting quintuplets from the show want to stay in USA - can the boys help? (S4, E04)

programme.title: South Park: Cartman Joins NAMBLA
programme.desc: Cartman Joins NAMBLA: Cartman joins The North American Man Boy Love Association but does he know what they really want? Meanwhile, Kenny will do anything to stop his parents having a kid. (S4, E05)

programme.title: South Park: Cherokee Hair Tampons
programme.desc: Cherokee Hair Tampons: When Kyle falls ill his mum goes to Miss Information's holistic medicine store - can herbs supplied by 2 "native" Americans really help? Guest stars Cheech and Chong. (S4, E06)

programme.title: South Park: Chef Goes Nanners
programme.desc: Chef Goes Nanners: Chef and Uncle Jimbo go head-to-head over South Park's racist flag but the townsfolk aren't fussed either way. Will the flag be made PC? Not if the KKK have a say! (S4, E07)

programme.title: South Park: Something You Can Do With Your Finger
programme.desc: Something You Can Do With Your Finger: Cartman is convinced that his dream is a sign from God, so corrals the boys into making a boyband called "Fingerbang". He's not happy when Wendy joins! (S4, E08)
programme.sub-title: Something You Can Do With Your Finger

programme.title: South Park: Jakovasaurs
programme.desc: Jakovasaurs: While camping, the boys discover the last two Jakovasaurs (a parody of Jar Jar Binks) on the planet. Will the townsfolk welcome them with open arms or find them very annoying? (S3, E04)

programme.title: Robot Wars: Battle of the Stars
programme.desc: Olympic athletes' the Brownlee brothers, DJ Scott Mills, space scientist Dr Maggie Aderin-Pocock and sport's presenter Suzi Perry help design their own fighting robots to battle it out in the bulletproof Robot Wars arena.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Battle of the Stars
programme.desc: Paralympic gold medallist Kadeena Cox, international football legend Robbie Savage, presenter Neil Oliver and popstar Jordan from Rizzle Kicks help design their very own fighting robot to battle it out in the bulletproof Robot Wars arena.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The teams are Donald Thump, Behemoth, Sabretooth, Apollo, Apocalypse and The Swarm. Along the way they must dodge arena hazards, menacing house robots and the all-new Fog of War.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Returning champions Carbide mount their title defence against some of the toughest machines in the competition. They will have to fight through brutal group battles and nightmarish knockout rounds to make it to the heat final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Competing in this heat are: Apex, Vulture, Terrorhurtz, Track-Tion, Bucky the Robot and Rapid. The battles are all overseen by judges Professor Noel Sharkey, Professor Sethu Vijayakumar and Dr Lucy Rogers.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The fourth heat features an experienced roboteer fighting to secure his legacy, a new wave spinner and a powerful crusher. Competing through group battles for a place in the final are Iron-Awe 6, The Kegs, Tauron, Nuts 2, Concussion and Androne 4000.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: This round determines which of the fighting machines makes it into the grand final, along with the final two robots to compete in the Ten Robot Rumble. Thor, Coyote, Expulsion, Hobgoblin, Push to Exit and Magnetar battle it out.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The illustrious grand final begins with the biggest battle in Robot Wars history. The second and third place robots from the heats will battle it out in a fight to the death to determine who will be the 6th and final robot in the grand final.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Extreme
programme.desc: The heavyweights take a back seat as the middleweights, lightweights, featherweights, and antweights take to the floor, but being smaller does not mean they do not bite.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Revealed
programme.desc: Behind-the-scenes footage of Heat L of `Robot Wars: The Second Wars', including video diaries of the Angel of Death, Tender Caress, Havoc and Haardvark teams preparing their robots for the main competition.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Revealed
programme.desc: Featuring behind-the-scenes footage of the semi-final round of `Robot Wars: The Second Wars', including highlights and interviews surrounding the Pinball Trial and Arena battle events.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Revealed
programme.desc: Behind-the-scenes footage of the second semi-final of `Robot Wars: The Second Wars', beginning with recaps of the second group of six competitors to reach that stage of the main competition.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Revealed
programme.desc: Four robotic warriors have battled their way to the Grand Final. The other competitors have been sent to a scrapheap. A look at what it's like behind the scenes of the most intense stage of the competition.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: An extensive and informative dive behind-the-scenes on the House Robots. Get inside information from designer Chris Reynolds, on what goes into creating these killing machines.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Follow Team Chaos's journey, from humble beginnings to how they ended up building one of the most feared Robots ever to compete.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The reigning champions Apollo mount their defence of the title. They face stiff competition from Ms Nightshade, Coyote, Rusty, Crackers'N'Smash, Meggamouse, Trolley Rage and Carbide.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: It is the grand final and the teams must dodge the arena hazards and, in a menacing new twist, they can also hit the Arena Tyre to unleash the dreaded House Robots, allowing them to inflict maximum damage anywhere in the arena.

programme.title: A Haunting: Trapped In Terror
programme.desc: Soon after moving into an older home in a quaint suburb of Cincinnati, OH, Taylor Jones catches her mother practicing black magic in her daughter Isabelle’s bedroom. Her fears become reality when Taylor notices Isabelle playing with an invisible friend.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: Romie moves into a new home but begins to have nightmares and see shadowy spirits pacing.

programme.title: A Haunting: Fear Feeders
programme.desc: Soon after Al Gonzalez purchases a home outside Fort Wayne, Indiana, he begins to hear strange noises and sees unexplainable shadows. Paranormal investigators determine the entities in Al's home are dangerous and that he is not their first victim.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demons Never Die
programme.desc: Shortly after starting a new job and moving his family to the suburbs, Bill Toler suspects his house is haunted. Paranormal investigators uncover a portal in their home and discover a demon followed Bill home from his job at the state penitentiary.

programme.title: A Haunting: Heartland Horror
programme.desc: Teenager Nolan Lydolph has seen ghosts his entire life. But after he and his parents return home from a ghost tour in Missouri, strange spirits creep through their home. Nolan undertakes a life-threatening struggle to rid his family of an undaunted evil.

programme.title: A Haunting: Sallie’s House
programme.desc: Deb and Tony’s son is born and his toys take on a life of their own.

programme.title: A Haunting: Haunted Past
programme.desc: As Deborah Utley begins experiencing paranormal events in her home, she turns to her faith for protection. But when her children are targeted by the entity she seeks the aid of paranormal investigators to end the cycle of terror.

programme.title: A Haunting: Nightmare In Bridgeport
programme.desc: Connecticut child safety specialist Bob Baker has devoted his life to protecting children from natural and supernatural harm. When his mother starts hearing voices in his childhood home, Bob is faced with a demon that evolves from his own nightmares.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Diabolical
programme.desc: A session with a Ouija board transforms Marie’s home into a portal for the diabolical.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ashes To Evil
programme.desc: Soon after moving in a large apartment in Hampton, Tennessee, Amelia’s family can’t shake the feeling that they are not alone. An evil entity lurks in their dream home and is targeting family members. They turn to paranormal investigators for help.

programme.title: A Haunting: Evil Rises
programme.desc: After a major surgery forces Jacinda Rearick to recuperate at home, she discovers orbs in family photos. At first, Jacinda believes that they are her deceased parents watching over her. But something much more sinister is invading her home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Where Evil Lurks
programme.desc: Soon after the Shea family moves into their new home, eerie noises and ghostly voices begin.

programme.title: A Haunting: Mother's Terror
programme.desc: When Jeanette's firefighter husband dies in the line of duty, she moves her daughters to a rustic hamlet in Long Island to start anew. Shortly after moving in, an evil entity lashes out at her daughter, Jeanette refuses to quit without a fight.

programme.title: A Haunting: Dark Wrath
programme.desc: Unsettling nightmares of a dark angry figure plague Cindy as she prepares to move her family.

programme.title: A Haunting: Dangerous Games
programme.desc: Carl, Keith and Cynthia Johnson begin using a spirit board, to communicate with the spirit haunting their home. But when their sister, Cynthia, is attacked both boys realize they are in over their heads and reach out to a paranormal investigator for help.

programme.title: A Haunting: Vision Of Terror
programme.desc: When Stacy Stowe hears ghostly sounds in her home, she assumes it's the spirit of her late husband who died in a tragic car accident. But a psychic warns Stacy that she will find no peace until she closes the portal that has opened the door for evil.

programme.title: A Haunting: Untouchable
programme.desc: After her mother, Linda, returns from a routine overseas trip to India, Kara Dravis begins experiencing unexplained and terrifying events in their home. Linda and Kara turn to a clairvoyant in hopes she can find a resolution to the haunting.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghosts Of War
programme.desc: When Dennis Pongratz finds his deceased father's Army belongings, he unlocks a treasure trove of WWII memorabilia, including an armband removed from a Nazi soldier killed in battle. Soon the Pongratz home becomes a battleground between good and evil.

programme.title: A Haunting: Blood Visions
programme.desc: Faced with a supernatural threat, Betty Johnson and her family move hoping to leave their troubles behind. But when Betty’s oldest child starts experiencing bloody visions and is physically attacked, the family realizes "it" has followed them.

programme.title: Safari Vet School
programme.desc: A mother giraffe and her baby have to be moved to another game reserve - but first they must be caught.

programme.title: Educating Cardiff
programme.desc: This episode focuses on a group of children who can sometimes present Willows High School with quite a challenge, but whom Head Teacher Joy Ballard can relate to.

programme.title: Educating Cardiff
programme.desc: The performing arts department at Willows High School is auditioning a fine array of talent from across the school to perform at a farewell concert as the series draws to a close.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in her home, police aren't sure if it's an accident or a murder until they receive an unexpected phone call, from an unexpected person.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After the naked body of an Ohio State senior is found, investigators bring in a suspect for questioning. They play a dangerous game of give and take, hoping to get the truth and bring justice to the victim and her family.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Manchester murderer, Trevor Hardy, took the lives of three teenage girls in the 1970s.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Bill Suff's murderous reign of terror spanned 6 years and stole the lives of at least 12 women in California.

programme.title: Britain's Darkest Taboos
programme.desc: Identical twin sisters Rachel and Tracy were raped by their uncle John McCallum when they were just five years old. The abuse lasted over a period of eight years until they were 13. In 2012, they broke almost 30 years of silence.
programme.sub-title: A Twins' Story: Our Uncle Raped Us

programme.title: Britain's Darkest Taboos
programme.desc: Chloe Gazzard discusses how her sister Hollie was stabbed to death by her ex-boyfriend at the salon where she worked.
programme.sub-title: My Daughter Was Murdered at Work by Her Ex

programme.title: The Real Story of...
programme.desc: A look at the real story of Zero Dark Thirty.

programme.desc: It is all hands to the pumps at a bus depot in Tamworth, where Crouch's finest are joined by Lanterns' Merrie. Just days after Christmas the owners lost their school coaches to a devastating fire and need the wreckage removed.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 1
programme.desc: A smouldering, 44-tonne food lorry blocks an M1 slip road.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 2
programme.desc: A milk tanker needs rescuing from a boggy field.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 3
programme.desc: Steve goes into battle with a heavyweight transformer.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 4
programme.desc: Nick is tasked with finding a 4 x 4.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 5

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 6

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 7
programme.desc: Steve and his team must recover a 26 tonne lorry.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 9

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 10
programme.desc: Tez and the team get in a jam.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 11
programme.desc: Rescuing a delivery truck from a pond, and a horsebox from a muddy field.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 12

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 13
programme.desc: Lee recovers a lorry with a ruptured fuel tank.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 14
programme.desc: A gravel truck has ended up in a ditch.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 15

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 16

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 17

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 18
programme.desc: Tez has a stinker of a job.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 19
programme.desc: Stig fears for his safety when he has to rescue a lorry.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives but they are so reliant that they are blind to the imminent danger they are all in.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: Aang attempts to find a Firebending master to teach him while Katara learns that she possesses a special power.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: After hearing rumors about surviving Airbenders, the kids journey to the Northern Air temple to see for themselves. What they find there could spell disaster for all enemies of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids reach the Northern Water tribe, and Aang and Katara look for a Waterbending Master as Sokka falls for a princess. Zuko must find a way to continue his quest for the Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: The Northern Water Tribe braces itself for an attack by Admiral Zhao's Fire Navy fleet. Aang struggles to defend the city. He wonders if there isn't a better way to use his Avatar abilities.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Zhao's invasion breaks through the outer wall of the Northern Water Tribe's defenses, and he reveals a sinister plan. Aang goes to the spirit world for help.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: Aang and the group meet an Earth Kingdom general who wants to use Aang's powerful `Avatar State' as a weapon to defeat the Fire Nation. But it's more difficult than Aang thinks.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: On the way to Omashu, the kids meet some nomads who show them a shortcut through the `cave of two lovers'. When they get lost in the caves, they must trust in love to escape.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: The kids return to Omashu so that Aang can learn Earthbending from King Bumi; however, when they get there, they are shocked to find the city is now in Fire Nation hands.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: When the kids end up in a mysterious and strange swamp, their fears are exposed. And Aang learns about being `connected to the Earth' from an unlikely teacher.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Aang and the gang discover an Earth town that celebrates `Avatar Day'. They learn that it is not a celebration of the Avatar, but a festival of anger for something Aang did in his past.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: In search for an Earthbending teacher for Aang, the kids go to an underground Earthbending tournament where they encounter Toph, a blind, but powerful Earthbender.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: Travelling without Uncle now, Zuko wanders alone into an Earth Kingdom town where he bonds with a local boy. Meanwhile, Zuko is haunted by memories of his own youth.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: As the kids are pursued relentlessly by a mysterious machine, their exhaustion puts them at each other's throats.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: When Aang struggles with a block while trying to learn Earthbending from Toph, he wonders if the problem is with him or his teacher. Meanwhile, Sokka gets himself in a jam.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: A professor leads the kids to a spirit library in the middle of the desert, where Sokka hopes to discover powerful secrets to use against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: Aang searches for Appa, while Katara struggles to keep everyone together so they can survive in the vast desert. Meanwhile, Uncle and Zuko seek help from an ancient secret society.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: When the kids can't take the easy way into Ba Sing Se, they must escort a family of refugees there the hard way, through the deadly Serpent's Pass.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: Aang discovers a colossal Fire Nation invention heading for Ba Sing Se, and the kids must stop it before it destroys the great wall that protects the city.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Aang and the kids finally arrive in Ba Sing Se to see the Earth King, only to find mysterious forces within the city conspiring to stop them.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: A series of short stories that explore the individual adventures of Katara and Toph, Uncle, Sokka, Aang, Zuko, and Momo.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: In this special episode, we go back in time to the moment Appa was stolen.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: While searching for Appa, the kids run into Jet but are torn about whether to trust him or not. Meanwhile, Zuko also hunts for Appa.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids battle Long Feng when they try to show the Earth King the conspiracy taking place in his city. Zuko becomes seriously ill and has odd dreams as he faces a spiritual crisis.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: A guru at the Eastern Air Temple helps Aang take the next step in his Avatar journey. Plus, Sokka meets his long-lost father, Azula hatches a diabolical plan, and Uncle and Zuko open a tea shop.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Everyone races against time to stop Azula's sinister conquest of Ba Sing Se. Zuko and Katara spend time together, while Aang's destiny hangs in the balance, as does Zuko's.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: After sustaining serious injuries, Aang awakens to find himself aboard a Fire Nation ship. Meanwhile, Zuko journeys home.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: To better camouflage themselves as real Fire Nation citizens, the kids check out a Fire Nation school. Also, Zuko confronts Uncle.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: The gang arrive at a suffering Fire Nation fishing village, and a mysterious spirit appears to help the villagers.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: Sokka feels that he is not contributing enough to the group, and searches for a mysterious master to teach him the ways of the sword.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Zuko, Azula, Mai, and Ty Lee go on vacation at Lo and Li's beach house, where they learn a lot about themselves and each other. Meanwhile, the kids face a new enemy.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: Aang and Zuko are taken on parallel adventures that give them insight into their forefathers' pasts, but how does the tale of Roku and Sozin matter to them now?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: When Toph discovers a quick way to make cash, Katara disapproves, and the rift between them has disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: In a spooky village, Katara makes a special connection; the group investigate strange disappearances that occur during full moons.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: On the eve of the eclipse, Aang's worry overtakes him and his dreams become nightmares. Before long, he can't tell the difference between what's real and what's not.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: With the day of the eclipse upon them, the kids, along with a ragtag force of old friends, enact their long-planned invasion of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: As the invasion force fights their way to the Fire Nation capital, the kids help Aang find the Firelord in time for the eclipse, but after a few surprises.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Beyond the Donatello Nebula
programme.desc: Donatello's efforts to contact life in the Turtle Nebula succeed only too well: he accidently transports a space-traveling lizard named Algy down to Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Bug Blunder
programme.desc: After Bebop and Rocksteady ruin an experimental batch of mutagen, Krang discovers that this new goo grows giant-sized insects. Shredder immediately sends some of the humongous bugs to Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Foot Soldiers are Revolting
programme.desc: Desperate for decent henchmen, Shredder decides to make some minions he can rely on, and uses Krang's brain wave enhancer on a robotic foot soldier.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Unidentified Flying Leonardo
programme.desc: Investigating reports of UFOs in the country town of High Falls, April uncovers a real scheme.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Turtles and the Hare
programme.desc: In Krang's latest scheme, Rocksteady and Bebop, dressed as Easter bunnies, are blasting people with a Docilizer Ray and turning them into timid, rabbit-like people.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Once Upon a Time Machine
programme.desc: Hokum Hare discovers that Shredder has a time train to travel to the future, where he can become crimelord of a crime-free era.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo Meets Mondo Gecko
programme.desc: Michelangelo is turtle-napped by mutant lizard Mondo Gecko, who was mutated at the same time and place as the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: Mutagen Man
programme.desc: Krang plans to use a large rocket's vapour trail to rain mutagen over the city when nerdy delivery boy Seymour Guts falls into Shredder's mutagen vat.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello's Badd Time
programme.desc: Hillybilly crooks Bedelia Badd and sons Bufrod and Bubbaheist the Turtles new improved van, using it to steal the diamond in Dr. Kepple's Powercizer, which drains the city's power and could destroy it.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo Meets Bugman - Again!
programme.desc: The Swatter threatens to destroy the city with a stolen swarm of super termites unless the Turtles meet him atop The Entire State Building.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Muckman Messes Up!
programme.desc: Krang sends Shredder, Rocksteady and Bebop after new mutagen Compound X-7, which Krang thinks will un-mutate Turtles. At lab, garbagemen are doused with the stuff and change into mutants Muckman and Joe Eyeball, blaming Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Napoleon Bullfrog: Colossus of the Swamps
programme.desc: Krang uses Big Louie to steal anti-freeze to try to start the Technodrome, now stuck in the Arctic. Shredder zaps Turtle pal Napoleon Bullfrog, with mutagen, who mutates into a giant monster and escapes into the city.
programme.sub-title: Napoleon Bullfrog: Colossus of the Swamps

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael vs. The Volcano
programme.desc: Raphael, convinced he is dying due to a faulty reading by Donatell's Health-O-Meter, becomes do-gooder THE Green Defender, popping up around the city foiling crime.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello's Duplicate
programme.desc: Donatello creates an egotistical Clone of himself who stuffs Donatello in a trunk.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Ice Creature Cometh
programme.desc: Bebop dumps a vat of mutagen into the Arctic ice, creating a gigantic Ice Monster, who Krang unleashes on the city to help him steal thermal nuclear devices to free the Technodrome.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo Cuts Loose
programme.desc: Muscleman fiend Wally Airhead captures Turtles with a runaway exercise machine trap to add their powers to his race of super musclemen, but Turtles escape.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Pirate Radio
programme.desc: Krang plots to take city by luring citizens into an inter­dimensional "Krang's Chasm" at sea by inserting Shredder in place of DJ. Dickie Bark as a Pied Piper on steamship radio station.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael, the Turtle of a Thousand Faces
programme.desc: Raphael disguises himself as Mad Dog McNutt, who is planning a heist of the Natural History museum.
programme.sub-title: Raphael, the Turtle of a Thousand Faces

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo, the Renaissance Turtle
programme.desc: Professor Mindbender fools the Mayor into installing Lex, a supercop robot, to clean up crime, but rewires him to arrest practically the whole city.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Zach and the Alien Invaders
programme.desc: Zach's over-active imagination has him seeing Aliens everywhere. Sent to Military School, he discovers actual Aliens posing as officers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Welcome Back, Polarisoids!
programme.desc: The Polarisoids return to Earth unwittingly invited by Krang, bringing to life the alien Creatures caught as images on tape as a distraction so Krang can break into the city's computer systems.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Planet of the Turtleloids: Part 1
programme.desc: Krang and Shredder transport to the City Wild Animal Park with Bebop and Rocksteady to create an army of Mutants from the animals there.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Rock Around the Block
programme.desc: Krang summons General Tragg from the Dimension X to keep the Turtles busy while Shredder places a remote control transmitter upon a rocket ship preparing to launch a satellite with a new super laser.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Krangenstein Lives
programme.desc: Under the Arctic Ocean Krang is tuning up his Robotic Body. While no one is looking, Bebop and Rocksteady inadvertently destroy an important computer chip and surreptitiously replace it with one from a video game.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Super Irma
programme.desc: While the Turtles are busy trying to decide what costumes to wear to this year's Channel Six Halloween party, April and Irma are doing a story on the reverse polarity magnet at Magno-Dyne Labs.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Adventures in Turtle-Sitting
programme.desc: While Splinter is away on meditative satori, Donatello sets his sights on solving world hunger. He invents the food revivafiver, a device designed to reverse the aging process of food.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Sword of Yurikawa
programme.desc: Krang plans to blow up the Tri-State Bridge just as a convoy of trucks carrying a rare form of toxic waste passes overhead.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Return of the Turtleoid
programme.desc: The Turtles go to the Top Notch Scientific Corporation to stand guard over the sonic disintegrator.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shreeka's Revenge
programme.desc: Shreeka, an alien with an attitude and a vendetta against Krang, after having spent eons tracking him down, has finally found him.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Too Hot to Handle
programme.desc: Donatello tells the other three Turtles that, based on his calculations, the Earth has changed its orbit and is heading for the Sun.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Nightmare in the Lair
programme.desc: Down in the sewers, while Michelangelo, Leonardo, and Raphael are watching yet another cheesy sci-fi film, Donatello is busy building the dream-o-vision.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Phantom of the Sewers
programme.desc: After another night's performance of the robotic Willie Wombat Revue at the Willie Wombat Revue Theatre, a mysterious figure, wearing a long black cape, black fedora, white face mask, and known only as the Phantom, makes an appearance.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo is Missing
programme.desc: When Donatello, Michelangelo, and Raphael return from the video arcade they discover that Donatello's lab is in disarray and Leonardo is missing.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Snakes Alive!
programme.desc: While practicing their martial arts, Leonardo tells Splinter that he is convinced that there is one combat maneuver he has yet to teach the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Polly Wanna Pizza
programme.desc: Michelangelo returns from his sojourn to the pet shop with a monkey named Clyde. After only a few minutes with the undisciplined pet Leonardo, Donatello and Raphael demand that it be returned to the pet shop.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Mr. Nice Guy
programme.desc: Burne assigns April a story reporting on the increase in urban crime. The only problem is that urban crime is decreasing.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Sleuth on the Loose
programme.desc: While the Turtles are watching their favorite TV show April interrupts the broadcast with a special bulletin about a break-in at Dynamic Science Labs.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Rust Never Sleeps
programme.desc: Krang works on an oxidizer rocket with enough power to blast the Technodrome to Earth, but something goes wrong, and instead of thrust, the device grows rust.

programme.title: Riptide: It's A Vial Sort Of Business
programme.desc: The guys are hired by a couple who are concerned that their son who was going to college dropped out and went to work in a fast food restaurant.
programme.sub-title: It's A Vial Sort Of Business

programme.title: Riptide: Peter Pan Is Alive And Well
programme.desc: When the Riptide agency is hired to catch a thief in a luxerous beach club, they come across an old lifeguard pal of Cody's.
programme.sub-title: Peter Pan Is Alive And Well

programme.title: Riptide: Catch A Fallen Star
programme.desc: When a mobster's son is out to kill a former actress the boys protect and help her to retrieve the property deed to Pier 56.

programme.title: Riptide: Gams People Play
programme.desc: A woman entering a beauty contest is threathened by an unknown adversary and the Riptide boys are hired to catch this person.

programme.title: Riptide: Prisoner Of War
programme.desc: Nick's new girlfriend runs away after witnessing a pedestrian get run over with deadly consequences.

programme.title: Riptide: Baxter And Boz
programme.desc: The boys are hired by the owner of a helicopter manufacturing business to expose some of his employees, who are covering up a dangerous design flaw.

programme.title: Riptide: Curse Of The Mary Aberdeen
programme.desc: A man who is supposed to be dead for eighteen years, hires the Riptide boys to find the Mary Aberdeen "before it kills again".

programme.title: Riptide: Boz Busters
programme.desc: When Murray is offered a dream job in computer research he leaves the agency and then goes missing. Nick and Cody set out to find him.

programme.title: Riptide: Oil Bets Are Off
programme.desc: When an oil magnet is murdered and the police aren't doing much about it, the Riptide agency is off to get some answers for the daughter of the deceased.

programme.title: Riptide: Girls Night Out
programme.desc: Two suburban women who owe money to a lone shark are forced to become burglars to pay him back.

programme.title: Riptide: Polly Want An Explanation
programme.desc: The Riptide agency, a wannabe-FBI agent, trouble prone con man Mack McPherson and his parrot all get in trouble with organized crime.

programme.title: Riptide: The Twisted Cross
programme.desc: A woman hires the guys to help her see her son whom her ex husband refuses to let her. They learn that the father is teaching his son to be a Nazi.

programme.title: Riptide: Fuzzy Vision
programme.desc: After the Riptide breaks down, the boys end up in a weird little town where a woman who can see into the future is suspected of murder.

programme.title: Riptide: Arrivederci, Baby
programme.desc: Nick "the pilot, Cody " the mustache" and Bozo "the docter" help Murray's Italian friend Angelo Guirilini, when his son is badly wounded.

programme.title: Riptide: Harmony And Grits
programme.desc: A seminar about harmony and communucation leads -apart from a fistfight and a bunch of arguments- to a concerned wife who's afraid her husband is having an affair.

programme.title: Riptide: Wipe Out
programme.desc: A so-called accident that took the life of a young surfer in 1964, causes repercussions today.

programme.title: Riptide: Thirty-Six Hours Till Dawn
programme.desc: Luitenant Quinlan and his superiors hire the Riptide Agency to pick up a female witness, ready to testify against her crooked husband.

programme.title: Riptide: Does Not Compute
programme.desc: When somebody is using computers to destroy the reputation of a congressman with controversial ideas, our private investigators decide to help out.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Gets A Kid
programme.desc: When word spreads that a student’s wealthy father is on his deathbed and preparing to leave gifts for the student’s favorite staff, Gerry makes sure to ingratiate himself to the young boy.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Goes To Prison
programme.desc: In an effort to make some fast money before March break, Gerry takes a side job teaching in a prison.

programme.title: Mr. D: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Gerry steps into the role of a lifetime and finds himself bitten by the acting bug and reveling in the newfound attention.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Throws The Game
programme.desc: Gerry takes on the senior girls’ volleyball team. But when he realizes their semifinals will be interfering with his all-important social schedule, he sets out to sabotage them at the quarterfinals.

programme.title: Mr. D: The Man With Two Red Shoes
programme.desc: When Gerry learns of a lurker near the school, he sets out to catch said lurker and earn the Teacher of the Month title.
programme.sub-title: The Man With Two Red Shoes

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Has Hot Sub Anxiety
programme.desc: Gerry is blown away by the hotness of the new substitute teachers and sets his sights on ‘hot-sub Mary,’ the new love of his life.

programme.title: Mr. D: Busplotation
programme.desc: When Gerry hears that a Kickstarter campaign raised a bundle of money for a bullied bus monitor, he sets out to victimize himself in a similar fashion. Meanwhile, Bobbi comes to a surprising realization and Dwyer has a ‘killer’ new girlfriend.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Charters A New Course
programme.desc: When Gerry isn’t given a full-time contract for next year, he makes a bold move that may change the course of his career.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Wants to Make Phys Ed Great Again
programme.desc: After finally achieving his goal of teaching physical education full time, Gerry sets out to teach the course the way it should be taught.
programme.sub-title: Gerry Wants to Make Phys Ed Great Again

programme.title: Broad City: Apartment Hunters
programme.desc: Abbi looks for a new place to live after walking in on Bevers masturbating, and Ilana tries to confront a cable company that has been inexplicably charging her for months.

programme.title: Broad City: The Last Supper
programme.desc: The girls go to a fancy restaurant for Abbi's 26th birthday, but the evening quickly sours after Abbi pees out a condom and Ilana reveals that she has a shellfish allergy.

programme.title: Broad City: In Heat
programme.desc: Ilana hunts for the perfect last-minute gift for Lincoln while Abbi tries to track down an AC to keep cool in the bedroom.

programme.title: Broad City: Mochalatta Chills
programme.desc: New opportunities arise as Abbi is finally able to train somebody at Soulstice and Ilana finds success as a corporate overlord.

programme.title: Drawn Together: Little Orphan Hero
programme.desc: Captain Hero delves into his origins, while the housemates go into suicide business.

programme.title: Drawn Together: Clum Babies
programme.desc: Wooldoor discovers the healing powers of his bodily fluids. Ling-Ling finds love.

programme.title: Drawn Together: Captain Hero's Marriage Pact
programme.desc: Captain Hero and Wooldoor battle over Unusually Flexible Girl, and Foxxy has a run-in with Foxxy 5.

programme.title: Drawn Together: Ghostesses in the Slot Machine
programme.desc: The housemates appease the spirits of dead Native Americans. Clara seeks her daddy's approval.

programme.title: Drawn Together: Super Nanny
programme.desc: Captain Hero faces off against Super Nanny, and Ling-Ling grapples with his cultural identity.

programme.title: Drawn Together: Captain Girl
programme.desc: The death of Captain Girl forces Captain Hero to fight crime and grief solo. Toot adopts a baby.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Bon Voyage
programme.desc: Appa and Umma's plans for the future push Appa out of his comfort zone. Janet gets an internship overseas while Jung and Kimchee explore new living arrangements.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa reaps the benefits of Umma's accessible parking pass. Janet embraces a new ambition. Meanwhile, Shannon and Jung spice up their long-distance romance.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Channouncements
programme.desc: A local celebrity takes over Umma's announcement duties at church. Appa takes issue with Janet's journaling. Shannon allows shorts in the office.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Appa & Linus
programme.desc: Appa unknowingly ruins Gerald's baby blanket. Jung invites Kimchee for a weekend in California. Janet tries to convince Umma to join a support group.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Tennis Anyone?
programme.desc: Appa and Umma sneak into a fancy neighborhood to play tennis. Shannon gives Omar some dubious advice. Janet befriends a coworker.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: A Tangled Web
programme.desc: Cousin Nayoung arrives with an unconventional pet. Jung and Shannon have a stressful lunch with Umma. Kimchee ignores a coworker's feelings.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Cookie Monster
programme.desc: Appa finds marijuana in the house. Shannon throws a staff party that doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Forever
programme.desc: When a private jet lands after a party, they find the trainer Lori Hutchins dead apparently stomped by the horse in the cargo bay. Grissom, Catherine, Nick and Capt. Brass investigate the case.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Inside The Box
programme.desc: A team of robbers heist the First Monument Bank and Detective Cyrus Lockwood is shot and murdered. The team investigate the case and find that the thieves wanted a specific safety deposit box in the vault.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Pilot
programme.desc: A murder appears to be a suicide with very little evidence.

programme.title: Law & Order: Good Girl
programme.desc: A secret interracial romance ends in a young black man's death.

programme.title: Law & Order: Survivor
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the robbery and murder of an antiques dealer.

programme.title: Law & Order: Corruption
programme.desc: The killing of a drug dealer leads to accusations of corruption in the precinct.

programme.title: Law & Order: Double Blind
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the shooting of a janitor with no apparent enemies.

programme.title: Law & Order: Deadbeat
programme.desc: When a man is murdered, his ex-wife and father-in-law become the prime suspects.

programme.title: Law & Order: Family Business
programme.desc: When heirs to a store chain are arrested for murder, their father tries to protect them.

programme.title: Law & Order: Entrapment
programme.desc: A young woman acting as an FBI informant successfully frames her friend.

programme.title: Law & Order: Legacy
programme.desc: An angry woman hires a hit man to take care of things.

programme.title: Law & Order: Menace
programme.desc: Ross sets about proving that a known bully is responsible for a girl's suicide.

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: A supposed interception of guns goes wrong when the accused links a border guard to his disowned Mormon family.

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: A media frenzy erupts when it’s leaked that 41,000 illegal immigrants, all with deportation orders, have gone missing across Canada. As Minister Fleischer takes the heat, Kessler and his ICS squad swing into action, rounding up illegals.

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: A former Canadian soldier freaks out in the customs hall at Pearson Airport. Moose tasers him, and he drops to the floor, dead. Amid the ensuing controversy, it’s revealed that the soldier was a drug mule direct from Kandahar, Afghanistan.

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: A Russian man is found frozen in a railway car. He turns out to be a former KGB agent with Russian mob connections. As ICS investigates where African blood diamonds are being “laundered” by Canadian mines, to an upscale New York City penthouse.

programme.title: CSI: New York: The Deep
programme.desc: A sailboat race to Staten Island takes an unexpected tack when one of the boats nearly collides with a dead scuba diving instructor.

programme.title: CSI: New York: You Only Die Once
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate a James Bond-esque gang of thieves who use high tech methods to steal personal account information from computers and phones before fleeing the scenes in a customized Batmobile-type car.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Down The Rabbit Hole
programme.desc: A murder victim bears a striking resemblance to a well-known avatar in the online role-playing game Second Life. Mac is forced to enter the game himself to solve the mystery surrounding her death. The assassin (Suspect X) escapes.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Big Nickel
programme.desc: Andy’s attempt to avoid Swarek is thwarted whenbothare assigned to a prisoner transport. When things go awry and theinmate breaks loose, the two officers are led on a cat-and-mouse foot chase through the meandering woods.

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: In the series finale Chloe and Marty get flirty again, but can they really stay just good friends? Kyle gets some big news from Boss Anna, but the fallout will change the family forever. (S13, ep10)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: The Geordies are back! Big Boss Anna shocks the Squad when she sends in some new workers to join them. The lads are excited but Sophie and Chloe aren’t so sure and things quickly go west. (S14, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Aaron and Marty decide to get close to newbies Sarah and Abbie. After her kick-off with Zahida, Chloe gets some big news. And the family is stunned when two more new workers arrive. (S14, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Nathan plans to test how radge the new workers are. Chloe returns, Marnie and Marty kick off over Aaron and there’s a huge shock when the next newbie arrives. Marty reaches out to Chloe. (S14, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Marty's plan to win Elettra over with a new hair colour goes west. Marnie's worried she's sending out mixed signals to Aaron. And when a new radgie arrives Chloe is all over him. (S14, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Marnie’s excited when the next arrival turns up, until Aaron gets stuck in and leaves her with a big decision. Marty’s desperate to step it up with Elettra but Chloe has other ideas. (S14, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: The house is stunned to discover that Marnie left after Aaron and Chelsea got together. Elettra and Marty boot off over their hot tub frisk and Chloe pushes Marty to breaking point. (S14, ep6)

programme.title: White Hot: A Sandra Brown Mystery
programme.desc: When her younger brother dies, Sayre breaks a vow and returns to her home in Louisiana. She gets drawn back into the web of her father, and when the police determine that her brother was murdered, Sayre must battle her family to get justice.

programme.desc: A victim (Wendy Crewson) of a serial rapist endures a legal battle against the Toronto Police Department.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered for Christmas
programme.desc: Postal detectives delay their own travel plans to help a little girl who wrote an urgent letter to God.

programme.title: Holidaze

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: In the feeding clinic Louise Knox, queen of convenience food, meets Carly Pitman, who's so busy she never finds the time to eat.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: It’s one of the tensest swaps yetas 32 year old monster portion king James Collier goes head to head with uninterested undereater 31 year old ModasserZafar.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Since leaving home 26 year old Kevin Calladine hasn't had a decent meal. Short on time and money his weight has plummeted to just 8 stone 7lbs and he's two stones underweight.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Junk food addict Andy moves into the feeding clinic with `too-busy-to-eat' Hannah, who battles with Andy's junk food medley as she forces down pizzas, burgers and kebabs.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: 41 year old Trudy from Bedfordshire runs her own business and is a mum of three. Kim is a fitness fanatic who runs 45 miles a week but eats like a sparrow.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: This week it’s atale of twoAmy’s in the feeding clinic as Supersize Amy Green who tips the scales at a staggering 20 stone 8lbs swaps diets with Superskinny Amy Walsh who only weighs 7 stone 10.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Who Shot Who?
programme.desc: A doctor treats three gunshot victims who claim to be innocent bystanders; on his first day on the job, a doctor must perform emergency brain surgery in the ER; a young bride-to-be suddenly slips into a diabetic coma.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Zombie Uprising
programme.desc: A Halloween zombie with a problem below the belt mystifies doctors; when two unconscious men are involved in an accident, a doctor helps police determine which one was the carjacker; a doctor makes a mistake that amazingly explains a patient's condition.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: RAINING CATS & DOGS
programme.desc: Three patients sneak their pets into the hospital, causing pandemonium in the ER; a man experiences paralysis that rises from his legs to his lungs, gradually suffocating him; a war veteran suffers from phantom pain in his amputated hand.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Life and Limb
programme.desc: Seven-year-old Brian has been hit by a truck and his arm has been ripped off. In a ten-hour operation, Dr Gottlieb attempts to re-attach the arm.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: My Job Is Mayhem
programme.desc: A man injured in a medieval roleplaying battle has a sword impaled in his head; a critically ill patient is so afraid of germs he won't allow doctors to treat him; two patients with the same life-threatening symptoms arrive separately from a fashion show.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Call The Code
programme.desc: A 21-year-old man has suffered internal injuries in a motorcycle accident. It's up to Dr. William Shillinglaw to save him from bleeding to death.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Skewered Skydivers
programme.desc: Two skydivers, impaled by the same fence post, are rushed to the ER; multiple patrons from a dance club suddenly stop breathing and Dr. Jasper must determine the cause; and a bride-to-be may miss her wedding after her finger gets stuck in a make-up jar.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: DR. ROBOT
programme.desc: Doctors use a robot operated by a specialist at another hospital to treat a seizing 7-year-old boy; a chef's tongue is swelling and it's only a matter of minutes before she won't be able to breathe.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: My Strange Addiction Special 2
programme.desc: In this one-hour special, we revisit six of our addicts whose stories shocked the world. Tune in for exclusive never before seen footage in this special episode.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Can’t Stop Cleaning/Love Rocks
programme.desc: Cyntrelle dropped out of high school because of her addiction to cleaning. Belinda's obsession with rocks has taken over her life, with more than 100,000 scattered around her home.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Married to a Doll/Picking My Scabs
programme.desc: Davecat has been married to his synthetic wife for 10 years. Meanwhile, Rachael hopes that her compulsive scab picking will stop by her wedding day.
programme.sub-title: Married to a Doll/Picking My Scabs

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Eats Toilet Paper/Blow Dryer
programme.desc: Lori has been sleeping with her blow dryer for 20 years, despite the risk burns or fire. Meanwhile, Kesha's family is concerned that eating half a roll of toilet paper a day is causing health issues.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Mannequin Invasion_Carrot Queen
programme.desc: Chad Michael is a mannequin fanatic. His collection of over 300 mannequins has taken over every room of his house. Zizi has 35 carrot tattoos and she’s decorated every room with a carrot theme.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: My Crazy Obsession Pilot
programme.desc: My Collection Obsession takes you deep inside the world of four of the country’s most obsessed collectors each taking their material obsession to jaw-dropping extremes.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: Wendy and Daniel are looking to downsize after their kids have moved out, but still want an elegant home. She's a physical therapist and she's a business analyst.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Energized
programme.desc: Danielle is helping quite a pair, Joseph is a chiropractor and Nadia is an aerospace engineer. They're looking for a home to start a family. Not only that, they want space to host their extended family. Will it be as difficult as rocket science?

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Fabulous
programme.desc: Janelle and Manuel are young professionals looking for more space. With one child tagging along on the tour already, they need a place for their growing family. They might need to do some renovations, but they want everything to be perfect.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Fun House
programme.desc: These two business owners Joseph and Heather work hard and want to play hard! They're looking for a place to entertain guests, and Daryl's got some amazing homes to show them.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Condo
programme.desc: Downsizing can be a difficult transition & Jin's objective is to make it as seamless as possible. In this episode, Jin is getting outdoors by practicing archery with Mike but mostly just to compete for bragging rights.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: King's Obsession
programme.desc: It is time to upsize! Daryl's client is moving away from downtown Toronto because they desire a bigger space, more privacy, & tranquility.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Rose Garden
programme.desc: Mike's couple is looking for their luxurious dream home anywhere in between Toronto & Barrie near HWY 400 in a prestigious neighborhood. They have a large dog, tall family, & want to start a family of their own.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Smart Investment
programme.desc: An amazing beachfront property is what Inez's couple is looking for & these top million dollar agents are sure to surpass their expectations.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Bucket List
programme.desc: Mike's friend invites him to an Indian wedding & tells him about his uncle who is looking for a luxury condo close to the airport. Daryl, Inez, & Jin support & donate to Mike's charity.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Right Choice
programme.desc: Somewhere to spend the rest of their days surrounded by nature sounds like a paradise to retire in. Daryl & Jin play some golf to discuss a potential listing she has found & Mike aids Inez in purchasing a new vehicle.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Big City Home
programme.desc: A young trendy couple wants to start a family in Toronto but they need some help from these top million dollar agents. Jin is a natural daredevil & has always wanted to skydive with her clients.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: City Dreams
programme.desc: Moving in together can be stressful but fun because you are starting a new life together! Inez's client is selling their separate properties & looking for a house or condo.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Cottage Getaways
programme.desc: Agreeing on a vacation home is made much harder when these top million dollar agents have astounding listings. Mike's client is looking for a waterfront cottage.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Perfect Neighbourhood
programme.desc: Remarrying is hard enough let alone combining two families under one roof. With a total of 4 children between the ages of 7 & 16 Jin's client is definitely going to need lots of space & land in a safe neighborhood.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Home Sweet Home
programme.desc: Now that Kristen & Kane have opened an office in Toronto, they will be travelling a lot from Vancouver & want somewhere of their own to stay in.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Classic Homes Are Timeless
programme.desc: Many people enjoy staying busy & always having a project on the go. Inez's client loves to build & create breathtaking properties. On their next project, this couple wants an interesting property.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Agents of Million Dollar Homes
programme.desc: Deborah & Vezi are an international couple that want to live in Toronto for one year but has no idea where to start looking. Luckily for them Mike, Jin, Daryl, & Inez have teamed up to find them the home of their dreams.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Glass House (Part 1)
programme.desc: The King is back, baby! Daryl King is known to make an entrance, and he wants the houses he shows to have that same "wow" factor. His clients are looking for a grand mansion

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Glass House (Part 2)
programme.desc: Will Daryl be able to dazzle his clients and find a property that will take their breath away?

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: A Palace Fit for a Princess (Part 1)
programme.desc: International luxury realtor Mike Donia jets off to Thailand to work with a client and good friend of his, Mae. She is moving back to her hometown of Bangkok to pursue her modeling career, and is looking for the house of her dreams.
programme.sub-title: A Palace Fit for a Princess (Part 1)

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent
programme.desc: With the help of a Bangkok real estate expert, Max Gloeckner, Mike is confident he can deliver just what Mae is looking for. This episode features the last two of four properties.
programme.sub-title: A Palace Fit for a Princess (Part 2)

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Infinite View (Part 1)
programme.desc: Vicky is searching for a home in The Beaches for her and her family. No one knows the Beach like Inez Kudryk, so Vicky enlists her help in finding some stunning luxury properties to tour.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Infinite View (Part 2)
programme.desc: Will Vicky find the forever home of her dreams? This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the clients decide to purchase and special appearances by guest agent Jasmine Xuereb.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Sunset on the Patio (Part 1)
programme.desc: Steve Bailey to save the day! This week's episode features the lovely couple Chris and Rosa as they search for the perfect home.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Sunset on the Patio (Part 2)
programme.desc: Unfortunately for Rosa, she isn't seeing the benefits of moving to a town around Cambridge. Steve's got some neat ideas, but will they be able to convince Rosa? This episode features the last two of four properties.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Sweet Home Belize (Part 1)
programme.desc: Sofie Kehdi heads to the island of Ambergris Caye, Belize to help a friend and former client, actress and choreographer Zuzana Marosová. As a public figure, Zuzana craves privacy in her personal time and is looking for a relaxing space.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Sweet Home Belize (Part 2)
programme.desc: With the help of local realtor Daniel Hartin, Sofie sets her sights on the perfect home...and hopefully a bit of fun in the sun! This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the client decides to purchase.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Nice Family Home (Part 1)
programme.desc: Jessica and Mark are a young couple living and working in Thailand after meeting there several years ago and falling in love. They are looking for a permanent home in Bangkok, and after chatting with her friend Mae.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Nice Family Home (Part 2)
programme.desc: With the help of local agents Max Gloeckner and Nala Gill, will Mike be able to find a place that suits the whole family? This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the clients decide to purchase.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Clever Income (Part 1)
programme.desc: After helping them find a home last season, Inez is enlisted by Martin and Cheryl to help them find the perfect investment property. While Cheryl wants a property with minimal work and no landlord responsibilities.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Clever Income (Part 2)
programme.desc: This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the clients decide to purchase, with special guest appearances by interior design expert Shelley Alexanian and guest agent Mo Loulou.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Open Concept (Part 1)
programme.desc: This week's episode features Cambridge realtor extraordinaire Steve Bailey as he helps couple Dan and Melinda search for the perfect home. It's a real battle of contemporary vs. traditional as Dan and Melinda.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Open Concept (Part 2)
programme.desc: This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the clients decide to purchase, with a special guest appearance by interior design expert Shelley Alexanian.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: A Big Investment (Part 1)
programme.desc: Vancouver-based couple Jim and Shannon are looking to relocate to their hometown of Toronto with their two daughters. With a budget of 10 million dollars, they enlist the help of savvy realtor Sofie Kehdi.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: A Big Investment (Part 2)
programme.desc: This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the clients decide to purchase, with a special appearance by guest agent Tyrone N. Steer.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Magical Home (Part 1)
programme.desc: Off on another adventure! This episode takes Mike Donia on a whirlwind tour of Southeast Asia as he searches for a home for his clients, Antonio and Kim. Featuring properties in Thailand.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Magical Home (Part 2)
programme.desc: Off on another adventure! This episode takes Mike Donia on a whirlwind tour of Southeast Asia as he searches for a home for his clients, Antonio and Kim. Featuring properties in Thailand.
